smart-notes-app

Project: smart-notes-app

View on GitHub

README

Smart Notes App

Full-stack notes application with AI-powered organization and a JSON-based data layer.

Contents

  • server.js — Express.js backend
  • routes/ — API route handlers
  • middleware/ — Express middleware
  • lib/ — Utility libraries
  • public/ — Frontend assets
  • data/ — Data storage

Setup

npm install
node server.js

Source Code

server.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import express      from 'express';
import { randomUUID, randomBytes } from 'crypto';
import { readFileSync, existsSync, renameSync } from 'fs';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
import { createRequire } from 'module';
import path         from 'path';
import multer       from 'multer';
import mammoth      from 'mammoth';
import cookieParser from 'cookie-parser';

// pdf-parse imported via CJS require to bypass its test-file initialization code
const require  = createRequire(import.meta.url);
const pdfParse = require('pdf-parse/lib/pdf-parse.js');

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname  = path.dirname(__filename);

// ── Auth / crypto imports ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
import authRoutes            from './routes/authRoutes.js';
import bookRoutes            from './routes/bookRoutes.js';
import { requireAuth }       from './middleware/auth.js';
import { loadNotes, saveNotes } from './lib/noteStore.js';
import { encryptNote, decryptNote } from './lib/crypto.js';
import { ensureDataDir }     from './lib/userStore.js';
import { loadToc }           from './lib/bookStore.js';

// ── Startup checks ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) {
  console.error('\x1b[31m❌ ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set.\x1b[0m');
  console.error('   Export it before starting: export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...');
  process.exit(1);
}

if (!process.env.JWT_SECRET) {
  const generated = randomBytes(32).toString('hex');
  process.env.JWT_SECRET = generated;
  console.warn('\x1b[33m⚠️  JWT_SECRET not set — using a random secret.\x1b[0m');
  console.warn('   Sessions will not survive a server restart.');
  console.warn(`   Make it permanent:  export JWT_SECRET=${generated}`);
}

ensureDataDir();

// ── App setup ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const app = express();

// ── Multer (file uploads) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
const upload = multer({
  storage: multer.memoryStorage(),
  limits:  { fileSize: 25 * 1024 * 1024 },
  fileFilter: (_req, file, cb) => {
    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase();
    if (['.txt', '.pdf', '.docx', '.json'].includes(ext)) return cb(null, true);
    cb(new Error(`Unsupported file type "${ext}". Allowed: .txt, .pdf, .docx, .json`));
  },
});

// ── Middleware ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
app.use(express.json({ limit: '2mb' }));
app.use(cookieParser());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'public')));

// ── Auth routes (no authentication required) ──────────────────────────────
app.use('/api/auth', authRoutes);

// ── Book routes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
app.use('/api/book', bookRoutes);

// ── CRUD ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// GET /api/notes
app.get('/api/notes', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const enc   = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  const notes = enc.map((n) => decryptNote(n, req.user.encKey));
  res.json(notes);
});

// POST /api/notes
app.post('/api/notes', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const { title, content } = req.body ?? {};
  const note = {
    id:        randomUUID(),
    title:     (title ?? '').trim() || 'Untitled Note',
    content:   content ?? '',
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  };
  const enc = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  enc.unshift(encryptNote(note, req.user.encKey));
  saveNotes(req.user.userId, enc);
  res.status(201).json(note);
});

// PUT /api/notes/:id
app.put('/api/notes/:id', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const enc = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  const idx = enc.findIndex((n) => n.id === req.params.id);
  if (idx === -1) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Note not found' });

  const current = decryptNote(enc[idx], req.user.encKey);
  const { title, content } = req.body ?? {};
  const updated = {
    ...current,
    ...(title   !== undefined ? { title:   title.trim() || 'Untitled Note' } : {}),
    ...(content !== undefined ? { content } : {}),
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  };
  enc[idx] = encryptNote(updated, req.user.encKey);
  saveNotes(req.user.userId, enc);
  res.json(updated);
});

// DELETE /api/notes/:id
app.delete('/api/notes/:id', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const enc      = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  const filtered = enc.filter((n) => n.id !== req.params.id);
  if (filtered.length === enc.length)
    return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Note not found' });
  saveNotes(req.user.userId, filtered);
  res.json({ success: true });
});

// GET /api/search?q=...
app.get('/api/search', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const q     = ((req.query.q) ?? '').toLowerCase().trim();
  const enc   = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  const notes = enc.map((n) => decryptNote(n, req.user.encKey));
  if (!q) return res.json(notes);
  res.json(
    notes.filter((n) =>
      n.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) || n.content.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    )
  );
});

// POST /api/import-legacy — one-time migration of old notes.json into current user's account
const LEGACY_NOTES = path.join(__dirname, 'notes.json');
app.post('/api/import-legacy', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  if (!existsSync(LEGACY_NOTES)) {
    return res.status(404).json({ error: 'No legacy notes.json found' });
  }
  let legacy = [];
  try { legacy = JSON.parse(readFileSync(LEGACY_NOTES, 'utf-8')); }
  catch { return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Could not read notes.json' }); }

  if (!Array.isArray(legacy) || legacy.length === 0) {
    return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Legacy notes file is empty' });
  }

  const existing = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  const existingIds = new Set(existing.map((n) => n.id));
  const toAdd = legacy.filter((n) => !existingIds.has(n.id));

  const merged = [
    ...toAdd.map((n) => encryptNote(n, req.user.encKey)),
    ...existing,
  ];
  saveNotes(req.user.userId, merged);

  // Rename the old file so it won't be imported again
  try { renameSync(LEGACY_NOTES, LEGACY_NOTES + '.imported'); } catch { /* ok */ }

  res.json({ imported: toAdd.length, total: merged.length });
});

// GET /api/notes/export — download all notes as unencrypted JSON
app.get('/api/notes/export', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const enc   = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  const notes = enc.map((n) => decryptNote(n, req.user.encKey));
  const filename = `notes-export-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.json`;
  res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `attachment; filename="${filename}"`);
  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
  res.send(JSON.stringify(notes, null, 2));
});

// GET /api/notes/export-with-toc — notes with chapter location embedded
app.get('/api/notes/export-with-toc', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const enc   = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
  const notes = enc.map((n) => decryptNote(n, req.user.encKey));
  const toc   = loadToc(req.user.userId);

  // Build a lookup: noteId → { chapterIndex, chapterId, chapterTitle, chapterDescription }
  const noteChapter = {};
  if (toc?.chapters) {
    toc.chapters.forEach((ch, idx) => {
      for (const id of ch.noteIds) {
        noteChapter[id] = {
          chapterIndex:       idx + 1,
          chapterId:          ch.id,
          chapterTitle:       ch.title,
          chapterDescription: ch.description ?? '',
        };
      }
    });
  }

  const result = notes.map((n) => ({
    ...n,
    toc: noteChapter[n.id] ?? null,
  }));

  const filename = `notes-with-toc-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.json`;
  res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `attachment; filename="${filename}"`);
  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
  res.send(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));
});

// POST /api/upload
app.post('/api/upload', requireAuth, (req, res, next) => {
  upload.single('file')(req, res, (err) => {
    if (err) return res.status(400).json({ error: err.message });
    next();
  });
}, async (req, res) => {
  if (!req.file) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No file received' });

  const { originalname, buffer } = req.file;
  const ext   = path.extname(originalname).toLowerCase();
  const title = path.basename(originalname, ext);

  let content = '';
  try {
    // ── JSON notes import ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (ext === '.json') {
      let parsed;
      try { parsed = JSON.parse(buffer.toString('utf-8')); }
      catch { return res.status(400).json({ error: 'File is not valid JSON' }); }

      // Accept a top-level array OR an object wrapping the array under any key
      let items = parsed;
      if (!Array.isArray(items)) {
        const wrap = Object.values(parsed).find((v) => Array.isArray(v));
        if (wrap) items = wrap;
        else return res.status(400).json({ error: 'JSON file must contain an array of notes' });
      }

      const enc   = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
      const added = [];

      for (const n of items) {
        let noteTitle   = '';
        let noteContent = '';
        let createdAt;

        if (typeof n === 'string') {
          // Plain string — first line becomes title, rest becomes content
          const lines = n.trim().split('\n');
          noteTitle   = lines[0].trim().slice(0, 100);
          noteContent = n.trim();
        } else if (typeof n === 'object' && n !== null) {
          // Try common field name variations for title
          noteTitle = (
            n.title ?? n.name ?? n.heading ?? n.subject ?? n.label ?? ''
          ).toString().trim();

          // Try common field name variations for content/body
          noteContent = (
            n.content ?? n.body ?? n.text ?? n.note ?? n.description ?? n.value ?? ''
          ).toString().trim();

          // Preserve topic/category as a header line so Claude can use it for TOC grouping
          const topic = (n.topic ?? n.category ?? n.tag ?? n.theme ?? '').toString().trim();
          if (topic && noteContent) noteContent = `[Topic: ${topic}]\n\n${noteContent}`;

          // If only content-like field found, derive title from first line
          if (!noteTitle && noteContent) {
            noteTitle = noteContent.split('\n')[0].trim().slice(0, 100);
          }

          // If only title-like field found, use it as both
          if (noteTitle && !noteContent) {
            noteContent = noteTitle;
          }

          createdAt = n.createdAt ?? n.created_at ?? n.date;
        }

        if (!noteContent.trim()) continue; // skip blank entries

        const note = {
          id:        randomUUID(),
          title:     noteTitle || noteContent.split('\n')[0].slice(0, 60) || 'Untitled Note',
          content:   noteContent,
          createdAt: createdAt ?? new Date().toISOString(),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
        enc.unshift(encryptNote(note, req.user.encKey));
        added.push(note);
      }

      saveNotes(req.user.userId, enc);
      return res.status(201).json({ imported: added.length, notes: added });
    }

    // ── Single-file imports (txt / pdf / docx) ───────────────────────────
    if (ext === '.txt') {
      content = buffer.toString('utf-8');
    } else if (ext === '.pdf') {
      const data = await pdfParse(buffer);
      content = data.text;
    } else if (ext === '.docx') {
      const result = await mammoth.extractRawText({ buffer });
      content = result.value;
    } else {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: `Unsupported type: ${ext}` });
    }

    content = content
      .replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').replace(/\r/g, '\n')
      .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n').trim();

    const note = {
      id: randomUUID(), title, content,
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };
    const enc = loadNotes(req.user.userId);
    enc.unshift(encryptNote(note, req.user.encKey));
    saveNotes(req.user.userId, enc);
    res.status(201).json(note);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Upload error:', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: `Could not extract text: ${err.message}` });
  }
});


// ── Start ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const PORT = process.env.PORT ?? 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`\x1b[32m✅ Smart Notes running at http://localhost:${PORT}\x1b[0m`);
  console.log(`   Press Ctrl+C to stop.`);
});
public/app.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
/* ── Marked config ────────────────────────────────────────── */
marked.setOptions({ gfm: true, breaks: false });

/* ── API helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
const api = {
  json: async (url, opts = {}) => {
    const r = await fetch(url, {
      credentials: 'include',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      ...opts,
    });
    if (r.status === 401) { window.location.replace('/auth.html'); return; }
    if (!r.ok) throw new Error(r.statusText);
    return r.json();
  },
  get:    (url)       => api.json(url),
  post:   (url, body) => api.json(url, { method: 'POST',   body: JSON.stringify(body) }),
  put:    (url, body) => api.json(url, { method: 'PUT',    body: JSON.stringify(body) }),
  delete: (url)       => api.json(url, { method: 'DELETE' }),
};

/* ── DOM refs — left panel ────────────────────────────────── */
const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id);

const notesList      = $('notesList');
const editorSection  = $('editorSection');
const noteTitle      = $('noteTitle');
const noteContent    = $('noteContent');
const saveBtn        = $('saveBtn');
const deleteBtn      = $('deleteBtn');
const splitNoteBtn   = $('splitNoteBtn');
const saveStatus     = $('saveStatus');
const newNoteBtn     = $('newNoteBtn');
const uploadBtn      = $('uploadBtn');
const exportJsonBtn     = $('exportJsonBtn');
const exportTocJsonBtn  = $('exportTocJsonBtn');
const fileInput      = $('fileInput');
const searchInput    = $('searchInput');
const clearSearchBtn = $('clearSearchBtn');
const notesCount     = $('notesCount');
const rawWordCount   = $('rawWordCount');
const currentUser    = $('currentUser');
const smartSplitBtn  = $('smartSplitBtn');
const logoutBtn      = $('logoutBtn');
const legacyImportBtn = $('legacyImportBtn');
const panelLeft      = document.querySelector('.panel-left');

/* ── DOM refs — right panel ───────────────────────────────── */
const bookWordCount    = $('bookWordCount');
const bookStatus       = $('bookStatus');
const savePdfBtn       = $('savePdfBtn');
const editTocBtn       = $('editTocBtn');
const fullscreenBtn    = $('fullscreenBtn');
const generateTocBtn   = $('generateTocBtn');
const rightSplash      = $('rightSplash');
const tocEditor        = $('tocEditor');
const tocBookTitle     = $('tocBookTitle');
const tocMaxNotes      = $('tocMaxNotes');
const tocRebalanceBtn  = $('tocRebalanceBtn');
const tocChapterList   = $('tocChapterList');
const tocAddChapterBtn = $('tocAddChapterBtn');
const tocRegenerateBtn = $('tocRegenerateBtn');
const tocApproveBtn    = $('tocApproveBtn');
const chapterView      = $('chapterView');
const chapterTabs      = $('chapterTabs');
const chapterStaleBar  = $('chapterStaleBar');
const rewriteChapterBtn = $('rewriteChapterBtn');
const chapterBody      = $('chapterBody');

/* ── State ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
let allNotes       = [];
let currentId      = null;
let searchQuery    = '';
let saveTimer      = null;

let tocData          = null;      // current TOC from server
let activeChapterId  = null;      // currently shown tab
let isWritingChapter = false;
let writingQueue     = [];        // chapters waiting to be written

/* ── Bootstrap ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function init() {
  try {
    const me = await fetch('/api/auth/me', { credentials: 'include' });
    if (!me.ok) { window.location.replace('/auth.html'); return; }
    const { username } = await me.json();
    if (currentUser) currentUser.textContent = username;
  } catch { window.location.replace('/auth.html'); return; }

  try { allNotes = await api.get('/api/notes'); }
  catch (e) { allNotes = []; console.error('Failed to load notes', e); }

  // Load existing TOC and set right-panel mode
  await loadTocFromServer();

  renderList();
  updateCount();
  updateRawWordCount();
}

/* ── Right panel mode ─────────────────────────────────────── */
// mode: 'splash' | 'toc-editor' | 'chapters'
function setRightMode(mode) {
  rightSplash.classList.toggle('hidden', mode !== 'splash');
  tocEditor.classList.toggle('hidden',   mode !== 'toc-editor');
  chapterView.classList.toggle('hidden', mode !== 'chapters');
  generateTocBtn.style.display    = mode === 'splash'                  ? '' : 'none';
  editTocBtn.style.display        = mode === 'chapters'                ? '' : 'none';
  $('regenerateAllBtn').style.display = (mode === 'toc-editor' || mode === 'chapters') ? '' : 'none';
}

function setBookStatus(text, cls = '') {
  bookStatus.textContent = text;
  bookStatus.className   = `organize-status ${cls}`.trim();
}

/* ── Load TOC from server ─────────────────────────────────── */
async function loadTocFromServer() {
  try {
    tocData = await api.get('/api/book/toc');
  } catch { tocData = null; }

  if (!tocData) {
    setRightMode('splash');
    return;
  }
  if (!tocData.approved) {
    setRightMode('toc-editor');
    renderTocEditor(tocData);
  } else {
    setRightMode('chapters');
    renderChapterTabs(tocData);
    // Open first unwritten or stale chapter, else first chapter
    const first = tocData.chapters.find((c) => !c.written || c.stale) ?? tocData.chapters[0];
    if (first) openTab(first.id);
  }
}

/* ── Generate TOC ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function generateToc() {
  if (allNotes.length === 0) {
    alert('Add some notes first before generating a table of contents.');
    return;
  }

  generateTocBtn.disabled = true;
  setRightMode('splash');
  setBookStatus('Generating table of contents…', 'busy');

  const maxNotes = parseInt(tocMaxNotes?.value) || 8;

  try {
    const resp = await fetch('/api/book/toc/generate', {
      method: 'POST',
      credentials: 'include',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ maxNotesPerChapter: maxNotes }),
    });
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status}`);

    const reader  = resp.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();
    let buf = '';

    outer: while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();
      if (done) break;
      buf += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
      const lines = buf.split('\n');
      buf = lines.pop() ?? '';

      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue;
        let msg;
        try { msg = JSON.parse(line.slice(6).trim()); } catch { continue; }

        if (msg.error) { setBookStatus(`Error: ${msg.error}`, ''); break outer; }
        if (msg.progress) setBookStatus(msg.progress, 'busy');
        if (msg.toc) {
          tocData = msg.toc;
          setRightMode('toc-editor');
          renderTocEditor(tocData);
          setBookStatus('Review your table of contents, then click Approve & Write', '');
        }
        if (msg.done) break outer;
      }
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Generate TOC error:', err);
    setBookStatus('Failed to generate TOC — try again', '');
    setRightMode('splash');
  } finally {
    generateTocBtn.disabled = false;
  }
}

/* ── Render TOC editor ────────────────────────────────────── */
function renderTocEditor(toc) {
  tocBookTitle.value = toc.title ?? '';
  tocMaxNotes.value  = toc.maxNotesPerChapter ?? 8;
  tocChapterList.innerHTML = '';

  toc.chapters.forEach((ch, idx) => {
    tocChapterList.appendChild(buildChapterEl(ch, idx, toc));
  });

  setupTocDragDrop();
  refreshDeleteEmptyBtn();
}

function buildChapterEl(ch, idx, toc) {
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className   = 'toc-chapter';
  div.dataset.id  = ch.id;
  div.draggable   = true;

  const staleFlag = ch.stale ? ' stale' : '';

  div.innerHTML = `
    <div class="toc-chapter-header">
      <span class="toc-drag-handle" title="Drag to reorder">☰</span>
      <input class="toc-chapter-title-input" type="text" value="${esc(ch.title)}" placeholder="Chapter title…" />
      <span class="toc-note-badge${staleFlag}">${ch.noteIds.length} note${ch.noteIds.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}${ch.stale ? ' ~' : ''}</span>
      <button class="toc-expand-btn" title="Show notes">▼</button>
      <button class="toc-remove-btn" title="Remove chapter">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="toc-chapter-body hidden">
      <textarea class="toc-chapter-desc" rows="2" placeholder="Chapter description…">${esc(ch.description ?? '')}</textarea>
      <div class="toc-note-list">${buildNoteChips(ch, toc)}</div>
    </div>`;

  // Expand/collapse
  div.querySelector('.toc-expand-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const body = div.querySelector('.toc-chapter-body');
    const btn  = div.querySelector('.toc-expand-btn');
    const open = body.classList.toggle('hidden');
    btn.textContent = open ? '▼' : '▲';
  });

  // Remove chapter
  div.querySelector('.toc-remove-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const i = tocData.chapters.findIndex((c) => c.id === ch.id);
    if (i !== -1) tocData.chapters.splice(i, 1);
    renderTocEditor(tocData);
  });

  // Title changes
  div.querySelector('.toc-chapter-title-input').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
    ch.title = e.target.value;
  });

  // Description changes
  div.querySelector('.toc-chapter-desc').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
    ch.description = e.target.value;
  });

  // Note move selects
  div.querySelector('.toc-note-list').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
    if (!e.target.classList.contains('toc-note-move')) return;
    const noteId   = e.target.dataset.noteId;
    const targetId = e.target.value;
    if (!targetId) return;

    // Remove from current chapter
    ch.noteIds = ch.noteIds.filter((id) => id !== noteId);
    // Add to target chapter
    const target = tocData.chapters.find((c) => c.id === targetId);
    if (target) target.noteIds.push(noteId);
    renderTocEditor(tocData);
  });

  // Per-note delete (empty notes) and ghost reference removal
  div.querySelector('.toc-note-list').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    // Delete empty note from the database
    const delBtn = e.target.closest('.toc-note-delete-btn');
    if (delBtn) {
      const noteId = delBtn.dataset.noteId;
      const note   = allNotes.find((n) => n.id === noteId);
      const label  = note ? `"${note.title}"` : 'this note';
      if (!confirm(`Delete ${label}? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
      deleteNoteFromToc(noteId);
      return;
    }
    // Remove ghost reference from TOC only (note already gone from DB)
    const rmBtn = e.target.closest('.toc-note-remove-btn');
    if (rmBtn) {
      const noteId = rmBtn.dataset.noteId;
      tocData.chapters.forEach((c) => { c.noteIds = c.noteIds.filter((id) => id !== noteId); });
      renderTocEditor(tocData);
    }
  });

  return div;
}

function buildNoteChips(ch, toc) {
  if (ch.noteIds.length === 0) {
    return `<span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--c-faint)">No notes assigned</span>`;
  }
  const otherChapters = toc.chapters.filter((c) => c.id !== ch.id);
  return ch.noteIds.map((id) => {
    const note  = allNotes.find((n) => n.id === id);
    const ghost = !note;                              // ID in TOC but note deleted/missing
    const title   = note ? note.title   : `[missing: ${id.slice(0, 8)}]`;
    const content = note ? note.content : '';
    const isEmpty = !ghost && !content.trim();        // only flag as empty if note actually exists
    const opts = otherChapters
      .map((c) => `<option value="${c.id}">${esc(c.title.slice(0, 40))}</option>`)
      .join('');
    return `
      <div class="toc-note-card${isEmpty ? ' toc-note-empty' : ghost ? ' toc-note-ghost' : ''}">
        <div class="toc-note-card-header">
          <span class="toc-note-card-title">${esc(title)}</span>
          ${isEmpty ? `<button class="toc-note-delete-btn" data-note-id="${id}" title="Delete empty note">🗑 Delete</button>` : ''}
          ${ghost   ? `<button class="toc-note-remove-btn" data-note-id="${id}" title="Remove ghost reference">✕</button>` : ''}
          ${!ghost  ? `<select class="toc-note-move" data-note-id="${id}" title="Move to another chapter">
            <option value="">Move to…</option>
            ${opts}
          </select>` : ''}
        </div>
        ${isEmpty ? '<div class="toc-note-empty-label">Empty note</div>'
        : ghost   ? '<div class="toc-note-empty-label">Note not found — removed or ID mismatch</div>'
        :           `<div class="toc-note-card-body">${esc(content)}</div>`}
      </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

async function deleteNoteFromToc(noteId) {
  await api.delete('/api/notes/' + noteId);
  allNotes = allNotes.filter((n) => n.id !== noteId);
  if (tocData) {
    tocData.chapters.forEach((ch) => {
      ch.noteIds = ch.noteIds.filter((id) => id !== noteId);
    });
  }
  updateCount();
  renderTocEditor(tocData);
  refreshDeleteEmptyBtn();
}

function refreshDeleteEmptyBtn() {
  const btn = $('tocDeleteEmptyBtn');
  const emptyNotes = allNotes.filter((n) => !n.content.trim());
  if (emptyNotes.length > 0) {
    btn.textContent = `🗑 Delete empty (${emptyNotes.length})`;
    btn.style.display = '';
  } else {
    btn.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

/* ── TOC drag-and-drop reorder ────────────────────────────── */
function setupTocDragDrop() {
  let dragSrcId = null;

  tocChapterList.querySelectorAll('.toc-chapter').forEach((el) => {
    el.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
      dragSrcId = el.dataset.id;
      el.classList.add('dragging');
      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
    });
    el.addEventListener('dragend', () => {
      el.classList.remove('dragging');
      tocChapterList.querySelectorAll('.toc-chapter').forEach((x) => x.classList.remove('drag-over'));
    });
    el.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
      tocChapterList.querySelectorAll('.toc-chapter').forEach((x) => x.classList.remove('drag-over'));
      if (el.dataset.id !== dragSrcId) el.classList.add('drag-over');
    });
    el.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (!dragSrcId || el.dataset.id === dragSrcId) return;
      const fromIdx = tocData.chapters.findIndex((c) => c.id === dragSrcId);
      const toIdx   = tocData.chapters.findIndex((c) => c.id === el.dataset.id);
      if (fromIdx === -1 || toIdx === -1) return;
      const [moved] = tocData.chapters.splice(fromIdx, 1);
      tocData.chapters.splice(toIdx, 0, moved);
      renderTocEditor(tocData);
    });
  });
}

/* ── Save TOC edits back to local state ───────────────────── */
function collectTocEdits() {
  tocData.title              = tocBookTitle.value.trim() || 'My Book';
  tocData.maxNotesPerChapter = parseInt(tocMaxNotes.value) || 8;
  // Chapter titles/descriptions are updated on input events
}

/* ── Approve TOC & start writing ─────────────────────────── */
async function approveToc() {
  collectTocEdits();
  tocData.approved = true;

  try {
    await api.put('/api/book/toc', tocData);
  } catch (err) {
    alert('Failed to save TOC: ' + err.message);
    return;
  }

  setRightMode('chapters');
  renderChapterTabs(tocData);

  // Queue all unwritten / stale chapters and write them
  writingQueue = tocData.chapters.filter((c) => !c.written || c.stale).map((c) => c.id);
  if (writingQueue.length > 0) {
    openTab(writingQueue[0]);
    await drainWritingQueue();
  } else {
    const first = tocData.chapters[0];
    if (first) openTab(first.id);
    setBookStatus('Book up to date', 'ok');
    setTimeout(() => setBookStatus(''), 4000);
  }
}

/* ── Regenerate TOC + rewrite all chapters ───────────────── */
async function regenerateAll() {
  if (!confirm(
    'This will regenerate the entire table of contents from scratch and rewrite ALL chapters.\n\n' +
    'Any manual edits to the TOC or existing chapter prose will be overwritten.\n\nContinue?'
  )) return;

  const btn = $('regenerateAllBtn');
  btn.disabled = true;
  generateTocBtn.disabled = true;
  setBookStatus('Regenerating table of contents…', 'busy');

  const maxNotes = parseInt(tocMaxNotes?.value) || 8;

  try {
    const resp = await fetch('/api/book/toc/generate', {
      method:  'POST',
      credentials: 'include',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify({ maxNotesPerChapter: maxNotes }),
    });
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status}`);

    const reader  = resp.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();
    let buf = '';

    outer: while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();
      if (done) break;
      buf += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
      const lines = buf.split('\n');
      buf = lines.pop() ?? '';

      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue;
        let msg;
        try { msg = JSON.parse(line.slice(6).trim()); } catch { continue; }

        if (msg.error) { setBookStatus(`Error: ${msg.error}`, ''); break outer; }
        if (msg.progress) setBookStatus(`TOC: ${msg.progress}`, 'busy');

        if (msg.toc) {
          tocData = msg.toc;
          // Mark every chapter as unwritten so they all get queued
          tocData.chapters.forEach((ch) => { ch.written = false; ch.stale = false; });

          setBookStatus(`TOC ready (${tocData.chapters.length} chapters) — writing all chapters…`, 'busy');

          await api.put('/api/book/toc', tocData);
          setRightMode('chapters');
          renderChapterTabs(tocData);

          writingQueue = tocData.chapters.map((c) => c.id);
          if (writingQueue.length > 0) {
            openTab(writingQueue[0]);
            await drainWritingQueue();
          }
        }
        if (msg.done) break outer;
      }
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Regenerate all error:', err);
    setBookStatus('Failed — ' + err.message, '');
  } finally {
    btn.disabled = false;
    generateTocBtn.disabled = false;
  }
}

/* ── Render chapter tabs ──────────────────────────────────── */
function renderChapterTabs(toc) {
  chapterTabs.innerHTML = '';

  toc.chapters.forEach((ch, idx) => {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className   = 'chapter-tab';
    btn.dataset.id  = ch.id;
    btn.textContent = `Ch. ${idx + 1}`;
    btn.title       = ch.title;
    if (ch.stale)            btn.classList.add('stale');
    if (ch.id === activeChapterId) btn.classList.add('active');
    chapterTabs.appendChild(btn);
  });

  // "All" tab
  const allBtn = document.createElement('button');
  allBtn.className   = 'chapter-tab';
  allBtn.dataset.id  = 'all';
  allBtn.textContent = 'All';
  allBtn.title       = 'Full manuscript';
  if (activeChapterId === 'all') allBtn.classList.add('active');
  chapterTabs.appendChild(allBtn);
}

function setTabState(chapterId, state) {
  // state: 'writing' | 'stale' | 'done' | null
  const tab = chapterTabs.querySelector(`.chapter-tab[data-id="${chapterId}"]`);
  if (!tab) return;
  tab.classList.remove('writing', 'stale');
  if (state === 'writing') tab.classList.add('writing');
  if (state === 'stale')   tab.classList.add('stale');
}

/* ── Open a chapter tab ───────────────────────────────────── */
async function openTab(chapterId) {
  if (isWritingChapter && chapterId !== activeChapterId) return; // don't interrupt

  activeChapterId = chapterId;

  // Update active state on tabs
  chapterTabs.querySelectorAll('.chapter-tab').forEach((t) => {
    t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.id === chapterId);
  });

  if (chapterId === 'all') {
    chapterStaleBar.classList.add('hidden');
    await loadAndShowChapter('all');
    return;
  }

  const ch = tocData?.chapters.find((c) => c.id === chapterId);
  if (!ch) return;

  // Stale bar
  if (ch.stale) {
    chapterStaleBar.classList.remove('hidden');
  } else {
    chapterStaleBar.classList.add('hidden');
  }

  if (!ch.written) {
    chapterBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="chapter-unwritten">
        <div class="chapter-unwritten-icon">📝</div>
        <p><strong>${esc(ch.title)}</strong></p>
        <p>This chapter hasn't been written yet.</p>
        <button class="btn btn-accent" onclick="writeChapter('${ch.id}')">Write Chapter</button>
      </div>`;
    updateBookWordCount();
    return;
  }

  await loadAndShowChapter(chapterId);
}

async function loadAndShowChapter(chapterId) {
  chapterBody.innerHTML = '<div class="md streaming-cursor"></div>';
  try {
    const { text } = await api.get(`/api/book/chapters/${chapterId}`);
    chapterBody.innerHTML = `<div class="md">${marked.parse(text || '')}</div>`;
    updateBookWordCount();
  } catch (err) {
    chapterBody.innerHTML = `<p style="color:var(--c-danger);padding:1rem">Failed to load chapter: ${esc(err.message)}</p>`;
  }
}

/* ── Write a single chapter (SSE) ────────────────────────── */
async function writeChapter(chapterId) {
  if (isWritingChapter) return;
  isWritingChapter = true;

  activeChapterId = chapterId;
  chapterTabs.querySelectorAll('.chapter-tab').forEach((t) => {
    t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.id === chapterId);
  });
  chapterStaleBar.classList.add('hidden');

  setTabState(chapterId, 'writing');
  setBookStatus('Writing…', 'busy');

  // Show streaming area
  chapterBody.innerHTML = '<div class="md streaming-cursor"></div>';
  const mdEl = chapterBody.querySelector('.md');
  let markdown = '';

  let countdownTimer = null;
  const startCd = (secs) => {
    if (countdownTimer) clearInterval(countdownTimer);
    let r = secs;
    setBookStatus(`Rate limit — resuming in ${r}s…`, 'busy');
    countdownTimer = setInterval(() => {
      r--;
      if (r <= 0) { clearInterval(countdownTimer); countdownTimer = null; }
      else setBookStatus(`Rate limit — resuming in ${r}s…`, 'busy');
    }, 1000);
  };
  const stopCd = () => { if (countdownTimer) { clearInterval(countdownTimer); countdownTimer = null; } };

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`/api/book/chapters/${chapterId}/write`, {
      method: 'POST', credentials: 'include',
    });
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status}`);

    const reader  = resp.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();
    let buf = '';

    outer: while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();
      if (done) break;
      buf += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
      const lines = buf.split('\n');
      buf = lines.pop() ?? '';

      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue;
        let msg;
        try { msg = JSON.parse(line.slice(6).trim()); } catch { continue; }

        if (msg.error)    { stopCd(); throw new Error(msg.error); }
        if (msg.countdown) startCd(msg.countdown);
        if (msg.progress) { stopCd(); setBookStatus(msg.progress, 'busy'); }
        if (msg.restart)  { markdown = ''; mdEl.innerHTML = ''; }
        if (msg.text) {
          stopCd();
          markdown += msg.text;
          mdEl.innerHTML = marked.parse(markdown);
          const gap = chapterBody.scrollHeight - chapterBody.scrollTop - chapterBody.clientHeight;
          if (gap < 100) chapterBody.scrollTop = chapterBody.scrollHeight;
        }
        if (msg.done) { stopCd(); break outer; }
      }
    }

    // Final clean render
    chapterBody.innerHTML = `<div class="md">${marked.parse(markdown)}</div>`;
    updateBookWordCount();

    // Refresh TOC from server (note hashes / written flags updated)
    tocData = await api.get('/api/book/toc');
    renderChapterTabs(tocData);
    setTabState(chapterId, null);
    setBookStatus('Chapter saved', 'ok');
    setTimeout(() => { if (bookStatus.textContent === 'Chapter saved') setBookStatus(''); }, 3000);

  } catch (err) {
    stopCd();
    console.error('Write chapter error:', err);
    setTabState(chapterId, tocData?.chapters.find((c) => c.id === chapterId)?.stale ? 'stale' : null);
    setBookStatus('Failed — try again', '');
    if (!markdown) {
      chapterBody.innerHTML = `<div class="chapter-unwritten"><div class="chapter-unwritten-icon">⚠️</div><p>${esc(err.message)}</p><button class="btn btn-accent" onclick="writeChapter('${chapterId}')">Retry</button></div>`;
    } else {
      chapterBody.innerHTML = `<div class="md">${marked.parse(markdown)}</div>`;
    }
  } finally {
    isWritingChapter = false;
  }
}

/* ── Write all pending chapters in sequence ───────────────── */
async function drainWritingQueue() {
  const total = writingQueue.length;
  let done = 0;

  while (writingQueue.length > 0) {
    const id = writingQueue.shift();
    openTab(id);
    const idx = tocData.chapters.findIndex((c) => c.id === id);
    setBookStatus(`Writing chapter ${idx + 1} of ${tocData.chapters.length}…`, 'busy');
    await writeChapter(id);
    done++;

    // Refresh tocData so written flags are current
    try { tocData = await api.get('/api/book/toc'); renderChapterTabs(tocData); } catch { /* ok */ }
  }

  setBookStatus('All chapters written', 'ok');
  setTimeout(() => setBookStatus(''), 4000);
}

/* ── Rebalance TOC ────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function rebalanceToc() {
  tocRebalanceBtn.disabled = true;
  setBookStatus('Rebalancing…', 'busy');
  try {
    collectTocEdits();
    await api.put('/api/book/toc', tocData);

    const { diff, message } = await api.post('/api/book/toc/rebalance', {});
    if (message === 'No changes needed') {
      setBookStatus('TOC is already balanced', 'ok');
      setTimeout(() => setBookStatus(''), 3000);
      return;
    }

    const changed =
      (diff.assignments?.length  ?? 0) +
      (diff.newChapters?.length  ?? 0) +
      (diff.removeChapterIds?.length ?? 0) +
      (diff.splitChapter ? 1 : 0);

    if (changed === 0) {
      setBookStatus('No changes needed', 'ok');
      setTimeout(() => setBookStatus(''), 3000);
      return;
    }

    const summary = [];
    if (diff.assignments?.length)     summary.push(`${diff.assignments.length} note${diff.assignments.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} reassigned`);
    if (diff.newChapters?.length)      summary.push(`${diff.newChapters.length} new chapter${diff.newChapters.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`);
    if (diff.removeChapterIds?.length) summary.push(`${diff.removeChapterIds.length} chapter${diff.removeChapterIds.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} removed`);
    if (diff.splitChapter)             summary.push('1 chapter split');

    if (!confirm(`Proposed changes:\n• ${summary.join('\n• ')}\n\nApply?`)) {
      setBookStatus('');
      return;
    }

    tocData = await api.post('/api/book/toc/rebalance/apply', { diff });
    renderTocEditor(tocData);
    setBookStatus(`Applied: ${summary.join(', ')}`, 'ok');
    setTimeout(() => setBookStatus(''), 4000);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Rebalance error:', err);
    setBookStatus('Rebalance failed — try again', '');
  } finally {
    tocRebalanceBtn.disabled = false;
  }
}

/* ── Word counts ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
function countWords(text) {
  return text.trim() ? text.trim().split(/\s+/).length : 0;
}

function fmt(n) { return n.toLocaleString(); }

function updateRawWordCount() {
  const words = allNotes.reduce((s, n) => s + countWords(n.title + ' ' + n.content), 0);
  rawWordCount.textContent = words > 0 ? `${fmt(words)} words` : '';
}

function updateBookWordCount() {
  const mdEl = chapterBody.querySelector('.md');
  if (!mdEl) { bookWordCount.textContent = ''; return; }
  const words = countWords(mdEl.innerText || mdEl.textContent);
  bookWordCount.textContent = words > 0 ? `${fmt(words)} words` : '';
}

/* ── Render notes list ────────────────────────────────────── */
function renderList(filtered) {
  const items = filtered ?? allNotes;
  if (items.length === 0) {
    notesList.innerHTML = `
      <div class="empty-state">
        <div class="empty-state-icon">${searchQuery ? '🔍' : '🗒️'}</div>
        <p>${searchQuery ? 'No notes match your search.' : 'No notes yet.<br>Click <strong>+ New</strong> to begin.'}</p>
      </div>`;
    return;
  }
  notesList.innerHTML = items
    .map((n) => {
      const preview = n.content.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').slice(0, 110);
      const date    = fmtDate(n.updatedAt);
      return `
        <div class="note-item${n.id === currentId ? ' active' : ''}" data-id="${n.id}">
          <div class="note-item-title">${hl(esc(n.title))}</div>
          <div class="note-item-preview">${preview ? hl(esc(preview)) : '<em>No content</em>'}</div>
          <div class="note-item-date">${date}</div>
        </div>`;
    })
    .join('');
}

function esc(s) {
  const d = document.createElement('div');
  d.appendChild(document.createTextNode(s));
  return d.innerHTML;
}

function hl(html) {
  if (!searchQuery) return html;
  const safe = searchQuery.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
  return html.replace(new RegExp(`(${safe})`, 'gi'), '<mark>$1</mark>');
}

function fmtDate(iso) {
  return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
}

function updateCount() {
  const n = allNotes.length;
  notesCount.textContent = `${n} note${n !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
}

/* ── Select / open note ───────────────────────────────────── */
function openNote(id) {
  const note = allNotes.find((n) => n.id === id);
  if (!note) return;
  currentId           = id;
  noteTitle.value     = note.title;
  noteContent.value   = note.content;
  setSaveStatus('');
  editorSection.classList.remove('hidden');
  notesList.querySelectorAll('.note-item').forEach((el) => {
    el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.id === id);
  });
  noteContent.focus();
}

/* ── New note ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function newNote() {
  currentId         = null;
  noteTitle.value   = '';
  noteContent.value = '';
  setSaveStatus('New note – unsaved');
  editorSection.classList.remove('hidden');
  notesList.querySelectorAll('.note-item').forEach((el) => el.classList.remove('active'));
  noteTitle.focus();
}

/* ── Save note ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function saveNote() {
  if (saveTimer) { clearTimeout(saveTimer); saveTimer = null; }

  const title   = noteTitle.value.trim() || deriveTitle(noteContent.value);
  const content = noteContent.value;
  if (!title && !content) { setSaveStatus('Nothing to save'); return; }

  setSaveStatus('Saving…', 'busy');
  try {
    let saved;
    if (currentId) {
      saved = await api.put(`/api/notes/${currentId}`, { title, content });
      const idx = allNotes.findIndex((n) => n.id === currentId);
      if (idx !== -1) allNotes[idx] = saved;
    } else {
      saved = await api.post('/api/notes', { title, content });
      allNotes.unshift(saved);
      currentId = saved.id;
    }
    noteTitle.value = saved.title;
    setSaveStatus('✓ Saved', 'ok');
    setTimeout(() => { if (saveStatus.textContent === '✓ Saved') setSaveStatus(''); }, 2500);
    renderList(searchQuery ? filterNotes(searchQuery) : undefined);
    updateCount();
    updateRawWordCount();
    // Refresh stale status without navigating away
    refreshStaleStatus();
  } catch (e) {
    setSaveStatus('✗ Save failed', 'err');
    console.error(e);
  }
}

function deriveTitle(content) {
  return content.split('\n')[0].trim().slice(0, 60) || 'Untitled Note';
}

/* ── Delete note ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function deleteNote() {
  if (!currentId) return;
  if (!confirm('Delete this note? This cannot be undone.')) return;
  try {
    await api.delete(`/api/notes/${currentId}`);
    allNotes = allNotes.filter((n) => n.id !== currentId);
    currentId = null;
    noteTitle.value   = '';
    noteContent.value = '';
    editorSection.classList.add('hidden');
    renderList();
    updateCount();
    updateRawWordCount();
    refreshStaleStatus();
  } catch (e) {
    alert('Failed to delete note.');
    console.error(e);
  }
}

/* ── Refresh stale status after note changes ──────────────── */
async function refreshStaleStatus() {
  if (!tocData || !tocData.approved) return;
  try {
    tocData = await api.get('/api/book/toc');
    renderChapterTabs(tocData);
    // Update stale bar if the active chapter's status changed
    if (activeChapterId && activeChapterId !== 'all') {
      const ch = tocData.chapters.find((c) => c.id === activeChapterId);
      if (ch?.stale) chapterStaleBar.classList.remove('hidden');
      else chapterStaleBar.classList.add('hidden');
    }
  } catch { /* ok */ }
}

/* ── Auto-save ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function scheduleAutoSave() {
  if (saveTimer) clearTimeout(saveTimer);
  setSaveStatus('Unsaved changes…');
  saveTimer = setTimeout(saveNote, 1600);
}

function setSaveStatus(text, cls = '') {
  saveStatus.textContent = text;
  saveStatus.className   = `save-status ${cls}`.trim();
}

/* ── Search ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function filterNotes(q) {
  const lc = q.toLowerCase();
  return allNotes.filter(
    (n) => n.title.toLowerCase().includes(lc) || n.content.toLowerCase().includes(lc)
  );
}

let searchDebounce = null;
function handleSearch(raw) {
  searchQuery = raw.trim();
  clearSearchBtn.style.display = searchQuery ? '' : 'none';
  if (searchDebounce) clearTimeout(searchDebounce);
  searchDebounce = setTimeout(() => {
    renderList(searchQuery ? filterNotes(searchQuery) : undefined);
  }, 260);
}

/* ── Note highlight helper ────────────────────────────────── */
function highlightNotes(ids, cls) {
  const set = new Set(ids);
  notesList.querySelectorAll('.note-item').forEach((el) => {
    el.classList.remove('organizing', 'organized');
    if (cls && set.has(el.dataset.id)) el.classList.add(cls);
  });
}

/* ── File import ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function uploadFile(file) {
  const ext = '.' + file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
  if (!['.txt', '.pdf', '.docx', '.json'].includes(ext)) {
    alert(`"${ext}" files aren't supported.\nPlease use .txt, .pdf, .docx, or .json.`);
    return;
  }
  setSaveStatus('Importing…', 'busy');
  const body = new FormData();
  body.append('file', file);
  try {
    const resp = await fetch('/api/upload', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', body });
    const data = await resp.json();
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(data.error ?? resp.statusText);

    if (data.imported !== undefined) {
      data.notes.forEach((n) => allNotes.unshift(n));
      renderList(searchQuery ? filterNotes(searchQuery) : undefined);
      updateCount();
      updateRawWordCount();
      setSaveStatus(`✓ Imported ${data.imported} notes`, 'ok');
      setTimeout(() => { if (saveStatus.textContent.startsWith('✓ Imported')) setSaveStatus(''); }, 3000);
      refreshStaleStatus();
      return;
    }
    allNotes.unshift(data);
    renderList(searchQuery ? filterNotes(searchQuery) : undefined);
    updateCount();
    updateRawWordCount();
    openNote(data.id);
    setSaveStatus('✓ Imported', 'ok');
    setTimeout(() => { if (saveStatus.textContent === '✓ Imported') setSaveStatus(''); }, 2500);
    refreshStaleStatus();
  } catch (err) {
    setSaveStatus(`✗ ${err.message}`, 'err');
    console.error('Import failed:', err);
  }
}

/* ── Split single note ────────────────────────────────────── */
const splitModal         = $('splitModal');
const splitModalSubtitle = $('splitModalSubtitle');
const splitModalSections = $('splitModalSections');
const splitModalApply    = $('splitModalApply');
const splitModalCancel   = $('splitModalClose');
$('splitModalCancel').addEventListener('click', () => splitModal.classList.add('hidden'));
$('splitModalClose').addEventListener('click',  () => splitModal.classList.add('hidden'));
splitModal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === splitModal) splitModal.classList.add('hidden'); });

async function splitCurrentNote() {
  if (!currentId) return;
  const note = allNotes.find((n) => n.id === currentId);
  if (!note) return;

  splitNoteBtn.disabled   = true;
  splitNoteBtn.textContent = '✂ Analyzing…';
  setSaveStatus('Analyzing note…', 'busy');

  try {
    const data = await api.post(`/api/book/notes/${currentId}/split-preview`, {});
    if (!data) return;

    if (!data.split) {
      setSaveStatus('Note covers one topic — no split needed', 'ok');
      setTimeout(() => setSaveStatus(''), 3000);
      return;
    }

    // Populate modal
    splitModalSubtitle.textContent = `"${note.title}" → ${data.sections.length} notes`;
    splitModalSections.innerHTML = data.sections.map((s, i) => `
      <div class="split-section">
        <div class="split-section-num">${i + 1}</div>
        <div class="split-section-body">
          <input class="split-section-title" type="text" value="${esc(s.title)}" data-idx="${i}" />
          <div class="split-section-content">${esc(s.content)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');

    // Store sections on the apply button for use on confirm
    splitModalApply.dataset.noteId = currentId;
    splitModalApply._sections = data.sections;

    splitModal.classList.remove('hidden');
    setSaveStatus('');
  } catch (err) {
    setSaveStatus(`✗ ${err.message}`, 'err');
    console.error('Split preview error:', err);
  } finally {
    splitNoteBtn.disabled    = false;
    splitNoteBtn.textContent = '✂ Split';
  }
}

splitModalApply.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  const noteId   = splitModalApply.dataset.noteId;
  const sections = splitModalApply._sections;
  if (!noteId || !sections) return;

  // Pick up any title edits the user made
  splitModalSections.querySelectorAll('.split-section-title').forEach((input) => {
    const idx = parseInt(input.dataset.idx);
    sections[idx].title = input.value.trim() || sections[idx].title;
  });

  splitModalApply.disabled    = true;
  splitModalApply.textContent = 'Applying…';

  try {
    const { created } = await api.post(`/api/book/notes/${noteId}/split-apply`, { sections });
    splitModal.classList.add('hidden');

    // Remove original, add new notes to allNotes
    allNotes = allNotes.filter((n) => n.id !== noteId);
    created.forEach((n) => allNotes.unshift(n));

    currentId = null;
    noteTitle.value   = '';
    noteContent.value = '';
    editorSection.classList.add('hidden');

    renderList(searchQuery ? filterNotes(searchQuery) : undefined);
    updateCount();
    updateRawWordCount();
    refreshStaleStatus();
    setSaveStatus(`✓ Split into ${created.length} notes`, 'ok');
    setTimeout(() => setSaveStatus(''), 3000);
  } catch (err) {
    setSaveStatus(`✗ ${err.message}`, 'err');
    console.error('Split apply error:', err);
  } finally {
    splitModalApply.disabled    = false;
    splitModalApply.textContent = '✓ Apply Split';
  }
});

/* ── Smart Split ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function smartSplitNotes() {
  if (!confirm('Smart Split will analyze your notes and use AI to split any that cover multiple distinct topics into separate notes.\n\nThis cannot be undone. Continue?')) return;

  smartSplitBtn.disabled = true;
  setBookStatus('Smart Split: starting…', 'busy');

  try {
    const resp = await fetch('/api/book/notes/smart-split', {
      method: 'POST',
      credentials: 'include',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
    if (!resp.ok) {
      const err = await resp.json().catch(() => ({ error: resp.statusText }));
      throw new Error(err.error ?? `HTTP ${resp.status}`);
    }

    const reader  = resp.body.getReader();
    const decoder = new TextDecoder();
    let buf = '';

    outer: while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();
      if (done) break;
      buf += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
      const lines = buf.split('\n');
      buf = lines.pop() ?? '';

      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue;
        let msg;
        try { msg = JSON.parse(line.slice(6).trim()); } catch { continue; }

        if (msg.progress) setBookStatus(`Smart Split: ${msg.progress}`, 'busy');
        if (msg.done) {
          const { analyzed, split, created } = msg.stats;
          const summary = split === 0
            ? `Smart Split: no notes needed splitting (${analyzed} analyzed)`
            : `Smart Split: split ${split} note${split !== 1 ? 's' : ''} into ${created} notes`;
          setBookStatus(summary, 'ok');
          setTimeout(() => setBookStatus(''), 5000);

          if (split > 0) {
            allNotes = await api.get('/api/notes');
            renderList(searchQuery ? filterNotes(searchQuery) : undefined);
            updateCount();
            updateRawWordCount();
            refreshStaleStatus();
          }
          break outer;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setBookStatus(`Smart Split failed: ${err.message}`, '');
    console.error('Smart split error:', err);
  } finally {
    smartSplitBtn.disabled = false;
  }
}

/* ── Tab key in textarea ──────────────────────────────────── */
noteContent.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  if (e.key !== 'Tab') return;
  e.preventDefault();
  const s = noteContent.selectionStart;
  const t = noteContent.selectionEnd;
  noteContent.value = noteContent.value.slice(0, s) + '  ' + noteContent.value.slice(t);
  noteContent.selectionStart = noteContent.selectionEnd = s + 2;
});

/* ── Keyboard shortcuts ───────────────────────────────────── */
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  const mod = e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey;
  if (mod && e.key === 's') { e.preventDefault(); saveNote(); }
  if (mod && e.key === 'n') { e.preventDefault(); newNote(); }
  if (mod && e.key === 'f') { e.preventDefault(); searchInput.focus(); searchInput.select(); }
});

/* ── Event wiring ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
splitNoteBtn.addEventListener('click', splitCurrentNote);
smartSplitBtn.addEventListener('click', smartSplitNotes);
newNoteBtn.addEventListener('click', newNote);
saveBtn.addEventListener('click', saveNote);
deleteBtn.addEventListener('click', deleteNote);

const leftFullscreenBtn = $('leftFullscreenBtn');

function toggleTocFullscreen() {
  const body = document.querySelector('.body');
  const on   = body.classList.toggle('right-fullscreen');
  fullscreenBtn.textContent    = on ? '⊠' : '⛶';
  fullscreenBtn.title          = on ? 'Exit fullscreen' : 'Toggle fullscreen';
  leftFullscreenBtn.textContent = on ? '⊠' : '⛶';
  leftFullscreenBtn.title       = on ? 'Exit TOC fullscreen' : 'TOC fullscreen';
}

fullscreenBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleTocFullscreen);
leftFullscreenBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleTocFullscreen);

// Escape exits TOC fullscreen
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  if (e.key === 'Escape' && document.querySelector('.body').classList.contains('right-fullscreen')) {
    toggleTocFullscreen();
  }
});

generateTocBtn.addEventListener('click', generateToc);
editTocBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  setRightMode('toc-editor');
  renderTocEditor(tocData);
  setBookStatus('Edit your TOC, then click Approve & Write', '');
});

tocApproveBtn.addEventListener('click', approveToc);
tocRegenerateBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (!confirm('Regenerate the table of contents? This will overwrite your current TOC structure (written chapters are preserved).')) return;
  generateToc();
});
$('regenerateAllBtn').addEventListener('click', regenerateAll);
tocAddChapterBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  tocData.chapters.push({
    id:          'ch-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10),
    title:       'New Chapter',
    description: '',
    noteIds:     [],
    noteHashes:  {},
    written:     false,
    stale:       false,
  });
  renderTocEditor(tocData);
});
tocRebalanceBtn.addEventListener('click', rebalanceToc);

$('tocDeleteEmptyBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
  const emptyNotes = allNotes.filter((n) => !n.content.trim());
  if (emptyNotes.length === 0) return;
  if (!confirm(`Delete ${emptyNotes.length} empty note${emptyNotes.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
  for (const note of emptyNotes) {
    await api.delete('/api/notes/' + note.id);
    allNotes = allNotes.filter((n) => n.id !== note.id);
    if (tocData) tocData.chapters.forEach((ch) => { ch.noteIds = ch.noteIds.filter((id) => id !== note.id); });
  }
  updateCount();
  renderTocEditor(tocData);
  refreshDeleteEmptyBtn();
});

// Chapter tab clicks (event delegation)
chapterTabs.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  const tab = e.target.closest('.chapter-tab');
  if (tab) openTab(tab.dataset.id);
});

// Rewrite active chapter
rewriteChapterBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (activeChapterId && activeChapterId !== 'all') writeChapter(activeChapterId);
});

logoutBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  await fetch('/api/auth/logout', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include' });
  window.location.replace('/auth.html');
});

legacyImportBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  legacyImportBtn.disabled = true;
  legacyImportBtn.textContent = 'Migrating…';
  try {
    const data = await api.post('/api/import-legacy', {});
    if (data) {
      alert(`✅ Imported ${data.imported} note${data.imported !== 1 ? 's' : ''} from your old notes.json.`);
      legacyImportBtn.style.display = 'none';
      allNotes = await api.get('/api/notes');
      renderList();
      updateCount();
      updateRawWordCount();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    alert(`Could not import: ${err.message}`);
  } finally {
    legacyImportBtn.disabled = false;
    legacyImportBtn.textContent = '📥 Migrate old notes';
  }
});

savePdfBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  if (!tocData) { alert('Generate a TOC first.'); return; }
  const prev = document.title;
  if (tocData.title) document.title = tocData.title;
  // If chapter view is showing all, print as-is; otherwise load manuscript
  if (activeChapterId !== 'all') {
    try {
      const { text } = await api.get('/api/book/manuscript');
      chapterBody.innerHTML = `<div class="md">${marked.parse(text || '')}</div>`;
      activeChapterId = 'all';
      chapterTabs.querySelectorAll('.chapter-tab').forEach((t) => {
        t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.id === 'all');
      });
    } catch { /* print what's visible */ }
  }
  window.print();
  document.title = prev;
});

exportJsonBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = '/api/notes/export';
  a.download = '';
  a.click();
});

exportTocJsonBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = '/api/notes/export-with-toc';
  a.download = '';
  a.click();
});

uploadBtn.addEventListener('click', () => fileInput.click());
fileInput.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
  const file = e.target.files[0];
  if (file) await uploadFile(file);
  fileInput.value = '';
});

// Drag-and-drop onto left panel
let dragCount = 0;
panelLeft.addEventListener('dragenter', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  dragCount++;
  panelLeft.classList.add('drag-over');
});
panelLeft.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); });
panelLeft.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
  if (--dragCount <= 0) { dragCount = 0; panelLeft.classList.remove('drag-over'); }
});
panelLeft.addEventListener('drop', async (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  dragCount = 0;
  panelLeft.classList.remove('drag-over');
  const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
  if (file) await uploadFile(file);
});

noteTitle.addEventListener('input', scheduleAutoSave);
noteContent.addEventListener('input', scheduleAutoSave);

searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => handleSearch(e.target.value));
clearSearchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  searchInput.value = '';
  handleSearch('');
  searchInput.focus();
});

notesList.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  const item = e.target.closest('.note-item');
  if (item) openNote(item.dataset.id);
});

/* ── Resizable horizontal divider (notes / editor) ───────────*/
(function () {
  const hDivider = $('hDivider');
  const MIN_H    = 160;
  const MAX_H    = 600;

  // Restore saved editor height
  const savedH = localStorage.getItem('editorHeightPx');
  if (savedH) editorSection.style.height = savedH + 'px';

  hDivider.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    hDivider.classList.add('dragging');
    document.body.style.cursor     = 'row-resize';
    document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';

    function onMove(e) {
      const panelRect = panelLeft.getBoundingClientRect();
      const newH = panelRect.bottom - e.clientY;
      const clamped = Math.max(MIN_H, Math.min(MAX_H, newH));
      editorSection.style.height = clamped + 'px';
    }

    function onUp() {
      hDivider.classList.remove('dragging');
      document.body.style.cursor     = '';
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
      const h = parseFloat(editorSection.style.height);
      if (!isNaN(h)) localStorage.setItem('editorHeightPx', h.toFixed(0));
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup',   onUp);
    }

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup',   onUp);
  });

  // Show/hide handle whenever the editor section visibility changes
  const editorObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {
    const hidden = editorSection.classList.contains('hidden');
    hDivider.classList.toggle('hidden', hidden);
  });
  editorObserver.observe(editorSection, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
})();

/* ── Resizable divider ────────────────────────────────────── */
(function () {
  const divider  = document.querySelector('.divider');
  const body     = document.querySelector('.body');
  const MIN_PCT  = 18;   // left panel minimum %
  const MAX_PCT  = 75;   // left panel maximum %

  // Restore saved width
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('panelLeftPct');
  if (saved) panelLeft.style.width = saved + '%';

  divider.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    divider.classList.add('dragging');
    document.body.style.cursor    = 'col-resize';
    document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';

    function onMove(e) {
      const rect  = body.getBoundingClientRect();
      let   pct   = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 100;
      pct = Math.max(MIN_PCT, Math.min(MAX_PCT, pct));
      panelLeft.style.width = pct + '%';
    }

    function onUp() {
      divider.classList.remove('dragging');
      document.body.style.cursor     = '';
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
      // Persist
      const pct = parseFloat(panelLeft.style.width);
      if (!isNaN(pct)) localStorage.setItem('panelLeftPct', pct.toFixed(1));
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup',   onUp);
    }

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup',   onUp);
  });
})();

/* ── Go ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
init();
public/auth.html HTML ▶ expand 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Smart Notes — Sign In</title>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg:        #0f1117;
      --surface:   #1a1d27;
      --border:    #2a2d3a;
      --accent:    #6c63ff;
      --accent-h:  #5a52e0;
      --text:      #e2e4f0;
      --muted:     #8b8fa8;
      --error:     #ff5b5b;
      --success:   #4caf7d;
      --radius:    12px;
    }

    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 1.5rem;
    }

    .card {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 380px;
      padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    }

    .brand {
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 2rem;
    }
    .brand-icon { font-size: 2.2rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
    .brand-name { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
    .brand-sub  { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.25rem; }

    .tabs {
      display: flex;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
    }
    .tab {
      flex: 1;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      padding: 0.6rem;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--muted);
      cursor: pointer;
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
      margin-bottom: -1px;
      transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .tab.active {
      color: var(--accent);
      border-bottom-color: var(--accent);
    }

    .form-group { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
    label {
      display: block;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }
    input[type="text"],
    input[type="password"] {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--bg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color 0.15s;
    }
    input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }

    .btn-primary {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #fff;
      border: none;
      border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 0.7rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      margin-top: 1.25rem;
      transition: background 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover  { background: var(--accent-h); }
    .btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

    .error-msg {
      background: rgba(255, 91, 91, 0.12);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 91, 91, 0.3);
      border-radius: 8px;
      color: var(--error);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
      display: none;
    }
    .error-msg.visible { display: block; }

    .hint {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="brand">
      <span class="brand-icon">📝</span>
      <span class="brand-name">Smart Notes</span>
      <p class="brand-sub">AI-powered book writer</p>
    </div>

    <div class="tabs">
      <button class="tab active" id="tabLogin"    onclick="showTab('login')">Sign In</button>
      <button class="tab"        id="tabRegister" onclick="showTab('register')">Register</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Login form -->
    <form id="loginForm" onsubmit="handleLogin(event)">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="loginUser">Username</label>
        <input id="loginUser" type="text" autocomplete="username" spellcheck="false" required />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="loginPass">Password</label>
        <input id="loginPass" type="password" autocomplete="current-password" required />
      </div>
      <button class="btn-primary" type="submit" id="loginBtn">Sign In</button>
      <div class="error-msg" id="loginError"></div>
    </form>

    <!-- Register form -->
    <form id="registerForm" onsubmit="handleRegister(event)" style="display:none">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="regUser">Username</label>
        <input id="regUser" type="text" autocomplete="username" spellcheck="false"
               minlength="2" maxlength="32" required />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="regPass">Password</label>
        <input id="regPass" type="password" autocomplete="new-password" minlength="8" required />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="regPassConf">Confirm password</label>
        <input id="regPassConf" type="password" autocomplete="new-password" required />
      </div>
      <button class="btn-primary" type="submit" id="regBtn">Create Account</button>
      <div class="error-msg" id="regError"></div>
    </form>

    <p class="hint">Your notes are encrypted end-to-end.<br>Only you can read them.</p>
  </div>

  <script src="auth.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
public/auth.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
/* ── auth.js ── runs on auth.html ───────────────────────────── */

// Redirect to main app if already authenticated
(async () => {
  try {
    const r = await fetch('/api/auth/me', { credentials: 'include' });
    if (r.ok) window.location.replace('/');
  } catch { /* not logged in — stay here */ }
})();

/* ── Tab switcher ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
function showTab(tab) {
  const isLogin = tab === 'login';
  document.getElementById('loginForm').style.display    = isLogin ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('registerForm').style.display = isLogin ? 'none' : '';
  document.getElementById('tabLogin').classList.toggle('active',    isLogin);
  document.getElementById('tabRegister').classList.toggle('active', !isLogin);
  clearErrors();
}

function clearErrors() {
  document.getElementById('loginError').classList.remove('visible');
  document.getElementById('regError').classList.remove('visible');
}

function showError(id, msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  el.textContent = msg;
  el.classList.add('visible');
}

/* ── Login ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function handleLogin(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const btn      = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
  const username = document.getElementById('loginUser').value.trim();
  const password = document.getElementById('loginPass').value;

  btn.disabled    = true;
  btn.textContent = 'Signing in…';
  clearErrors();

  try {
    const r = await fetch('/api/auth/login', {
      method:      'POST',
      credentials: 'include',
      headers:     { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:        JSON.stringify({ username, password }),
    });
    const data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { showError('loginError', data.error ?? 'Login failed'); return; }
    window.location.replace('/');
  } catch {
    showError('loginError', 'Network error — is the server running?');
  } finally {
    btn.disabled    = false;
    btn.textContent = 'Sign In';
  }
}

/* ── Register ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
async function handleRegister(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const btn      = document.getElementById('regBtn');
  const username = document.getElementById('regUser').value.trim();
  const password = document.getElementById('regPass').value;
  const confirm  = document.getElementById('regPassConf').value;

  clearErrors();

  if (password !== confirm) {
    showError('regError', 'Passwords do not match');
    return;
  }

  btn.disabled    = true;
  btn.textContent = 'Creating account…';

  try {
    const r = await fetch('/api/auth/register', {
      method:      'POST',
      credentials: 'include',
      headers:     { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:        JSON.stringify({ username, password }),
    });
    const data = await r.json();
    if (!r.ok) { showError('regError', data.error ?? 'Registration failed'); return; }
    window.location.replace('/');
  } catch {
    showError('regError', 'Network error — is the server running?');
  } finally {
    btn.disabled    = false;
    btn.textContent = 'Create Account';
  }
}
public/index.html HTML ▶ expand 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Smart Notes</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" />
</head>
<body>
  <div class="app">

    <!-- ── Header ── -->
    <header class="header">
      <div class="header-brand">
        <span class="brand-icon">📝</span>
        <span class="brand-name">Smart Notes</span>
      </div>

      <div class="header-search">
        <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
        <input
          id="searchInput"
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search notes…"
          autocomplete="off"
          spellcheck="false"
        />
        <button id="clearSearchBtn" class="clear-btn" title="Clear search" aria-label="Clear search">✕</button>
      </div>

      <div class="header-meta">
        <span id="notesCount" class="notes-count">0 notes</span>
        <span id="currentUser" class="current-user"></span>
        <button id="logoutBtn" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" title="Sign out">↩ Sign out</button>
      </div>
    </header>

    <!-- ── Body ── -->
    <div class="body">

      <!-- ── Left panel ── -->
      <aside class="panel panel-left">

        <!-- drag-and-drop overlay (shown while dragging a file over this panel) -->
        <div class="drop-overlay" id="dropOverlay">
          <div class="drop-msg">
            <span class="drop-icon">📄</span>
            <p>Drop to import</p>
            <p class="drop-types">.txt · .pdf · .docx</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- hidden file input -->
        <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept=".txt,.pdf,.docx,.json" style="display:none" />

        <!-- panel header -->
        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="panel-title-group">
            <span class="panel-title">NOTES</span>
            <span id="rawWordCount" class="word-count"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="panel-header-btns">
            <button id="legacyImportBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Import your pre-login notes.json into this account">📥 Migrate old notes</button>
            <button id="smartSplitBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Use AI to split multi-topic notes into separate notes">✂ Smart Split</button>
            <button id="uploadBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Import .txt, .pdf, .docx, or .json file">📎 Import</button>
            <button id="exportJsonBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Download all notes as unencrypted JSON">⬇ Export JSON</button>
            <button id="exportTocJsonBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Download notes with TOC chapter location as JSON">⬇ Export with TOC</button>
            <button id="leftFullscreenBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="TOC fullscreen">⛶</button>
            <button id="newNoteBtn" class="btn btn-accent">+ New</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- notes list -->
        <div id="notesList" class="notes-list"></div>

        <!-- horizontal resize handle -->
        <div id="hDivider" class="h-divider hidden"></div>

        <!-- editor (hidden until a note is selected / created) -->
        <div id="editorSection" class="editor-section hidden">
          <div class="editor-titlebar">
            <input
              id="noteTitle"
              class="editor-title"
              type="text"
              placeholder="Title…"
              autocomplete="off"
              spellcheck="true"
            />
          </div>
          <textarea
            id="noteContent"
            class="editor-body"
            placeholder="Write your note here…"
            spellcheck="true"
          ></textarea>
          <div class="editor-footer">
            <button id="saveBtn" class="btn btn-success">💾 Save</button>
            <button id="deleteBtn" class="btn btn-ghost-danger">🗑 Delete</button>
            <button id="splitNoteBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Use AI to split this note into separate notes">✂ Split</button>
            <span id="saveStatus" class="save-status"></span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </aside>

      <!-- ── Divider ── -->
      <div class="divider" aria-hidden="true"></div>

      <!-- ── Right panel ── -->
      <main class="panel panel-right">

        <div class="panel-header">
          <div class="panel-title-group">
            <span class="panel-title">BOOK BUILDER</span>
            <span id="bookWordCount" class="word-count"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="panel-actions">
            <span id="bookStatus" class="organize-status"></span>
            <button id="savePdfBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Save manuscript as PDF">📄 Save PDF</button>
            <button id="editTocBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" style="display:none">✏️ Edit TOC</button>
            <button id="regenerateAllBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" style="display:none" title="Regenerate TOC from scratch and rewrite all chapters">↺ Regenerate All</button>
            <button id="fullscreenBtn" class="btn btn-ghost" title="Toggle fullscreen">⛶</button>
            <button id="generateTocBtn" class="btn btn-accent">✨ Generate TOC</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Splash: no TOC yet -->
        <div id="rightSplash" class="organized-content">
          <div class="splash">
            <div class="splash-icon">📚</div>
            <p class="splash-title">Book Builder</p>
            <p class="splash-sub">Add notes on the left, then click <strong>Generate TOC</strong> to structure your book. Each chapter is written separately and saved as its own file.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- TOC Editor -->
        <div id="tocEditor" class="toc-editor hidden">
          <div class="toc-editor-header">
            <input id="tocBookTitle" type="text" class="toc-book-title" placeholder="Book Title…" />
            <div class="toc-settings">
              <label class="toc-setting-label">
                Max notes/chapter:
                <input id="tocMaxNotes" type="number" min="2" max="50" value="8" class="toc-max-input" />
              </label>
              <button id="tocRebalanceBtn" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">⚖ Rebalance</button>
              <button id="tocDeleteEmptyBtn" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" title="Delete all notes with no content" style="display:none">🗑 Delete empty</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="tocChapterList" class="toc-chapter-list"></div>
          <div class="toc-editor-footer">
            <button id="tocAddChapterBtn" class="btn btn-ghost">+ Add Chapter</button>
            <div class="toc-footer-right">
              <button id="tocRegenerateBtn" class="btn btn-ghost">↺ Regenerate</button>
              <button id="tocApproveBtn" class="btn btn-accent">✓ Approve &amp; Write</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Chapter View -->
        <div id="chapterView" class="chapter-view hidden">
          <div id="chapterTabs" class="chapter-tabs"></div>
          <div class="chapter-content-wrap">
            <div id="chapterStaleBar" class="chapter-stale-bar hidden">
              Notes changed — this chapter may be outdated
              <button id="rewriteChapterBtn" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm">↺ Rewrite</button>
            </div>
            <div id="chapterBody" class="chapter-body"></div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </main>

    </div><!-- /body -->
  </div><!-- /app -->

  <!-- Split preview modal -->
  <div id="splitModal" class="split-modal-overlay hidden">
