    <div class="split-modal">
      <div class="split-modal-header">
        <span class="split-modal-title">Split Note Preview</span>
        <button id="splitModalClose" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">✕</button>
      </div>
      <p id="splitModalSubtitle" class="split-modal-subtitle"></p>
      <div id="splitModalSections" class="split-modal-sections"></div>
      <div class="split-modal-footer">
        <span class="split-modal-hint">You can edit titles before applying.</span>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem">
          <button id="splitModalCancel" class="btn btn-ghost">Cancel</button>
          <button id="splitModalApply" class="btn btn-accent">✓ Apply Split</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- marked for Markdown rendering (CDN, no build step needed) -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@11/marked.min.js"></script>
  <script src="app.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
public/style.css CSS ▶ expand 
/* ── Reset & variables ─────────────────────────────────────── */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --c-bg:        #f1f5f9;
  --c-surface:   #ffffff;
  --c-border:    #e2e8f0;
  --c-border-2:  #cbd5e1;
  --c-text:      #0f172a;
  --c-muted:     #64748b;
  --c-faint:     #94a3b8;

  --c-accent:    #6366f1;
  --c-accent-dk: #4f46e5;
  --c-success:   #22c55e;
  --c-success-dk:#16a34a;
  --c-danger:    #ef4444;

  --c-header-bg: #0f172a;
  --c-header-fg: #f8fafc;

  --radius:      8px;
  --radius-sm:   5px;
  --shadow:      0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.08), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  --shadow-md:   0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);

  --font: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
  --mono: 'Cascadia Code', 'Fira Code', 'Courier New', monospace;
}

html, body { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }
body { font-family: var(--font); background: var(--c-bg); color: var(--c-text); }

/* ── App shell ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.app { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }

/* ── Header ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.header {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  height: 56px;
  background: var(--c-header-bg);
  color: var(--c-header-fg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0 1.25rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  z-index: 20;
}

.header-brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.brand-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }
.brand-name {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -.3px;
}

.header-search {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 480px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.search-icon {
  position: absolute;
  left: .7rem;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  font-size: .8rem;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.header-search input {
  width: 100%;
  padding: .4rem 2.2rem .4rem 2rem;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  color: var(--c-header-fg);
  font-size: .8125rem;
  font-family: var(--font);
  outline: none;
  transition: background .15s, border-color .15s;
}
.header-search input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,.45); }
.header-search input:focus {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.16);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.38);
}

.clear-btn {
  position: absolute;
  right: .55rem;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.45);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: .75rem;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 2px 4px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  display: none; /* shown via JS */
}
.clear-btn:hover { color: var(--c-header-fg); }

.header-meta {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .75rem;
}
.notes-count  { font-size: .75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,.45); }
.current-user { font-size: .75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,.55); font-weight: 600; }
.btn-sm       { font-size: .75rem; padding: .25rem .6rem; }

/* ── Body (split) ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.body {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* ── Panels ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.panel {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.panel-left {
  position: relative;
  width: 38%;
  min-width: 280px;
  background: var(--c-surface);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--c-border);
}

/* ── Drop overlay (drag-and-drop) ──────────────────────────── */
.drop-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.07);
  border: 2px dashed var(--c-accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 40;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity .15s;
}
.panel-left.drag-over .drop-overlay { opacity: 1; }

.drop-msg  { text-align: center; }
.drop-icon { font-size: 2.25rem; display: block; margin-bottom: .5rem; }
.drop-msg p { font-size: .875rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--c-accent); }
.drop-types { font-size: .75rem !important; font-weight: 400 !important; color: var(--c-muted) !important; margin-top: .25rem; }

/* panel header button group */
.panel-header-btns { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem; }
.panel-right {
  flex: 1;
  background: var(--c-bg);
}

.panel-header {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  padding: .7rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  background: var(--c-surface);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .75rem;
}
.panel-title-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .15rem;
}
.panel-title {
  font-size: .7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .07em;
  color: var(--c-muted);
}
.word-count {
  font-size: .68rem;
  color: var(--c-faint);
}
.panel-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .6rem;
}

.divider {
  width: 5px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  background: var(--c-border);
  cursor: col-resize;
  transition: background .15s;
  position: relative;
}
.divider:hover,
.divider.dragging { background: var(--c-accent); }
/* Widen the grab area without changing the visual width */
.divider::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 -4px;
}

/* ── Buttons ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .3rem;
  padding: .35rem .8rem;
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  font-family: var(--font);
  font-size: .775rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background .12s, opacity .12s;
}
.btn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }

.btn-accent  { background: var(--c-accent);  color: #fff; }
.btn-accent:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--c-accent-dk); }

.btn-success { background: var(--c-success); color: #fff; }
.btn-success:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--c-success-dk); }

.btn-ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border-2);
}
.btn-ghost:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: var(--c-bg);
  color: var(--c-text);
  border-color: var(--c-muted);
}

.btn-ghost-danger {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--c-danger);
  border: 1px solid var(--c-danger);
}
.btn-ghost-danger:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: var(--c-danger);
  color: #fff;
}

/* ── Notes list ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.notes-list {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: .4rem .5rem;
  min-height: 0;
}

.note-item {
  padding: .65rem .85rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  cursor: pointer;
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  transition: background .1s, border-color .1s;
  margin-bottom: .2rem;
}
.note-item:hover { background: var(--c-bg); }
.note-item.active {
  background: #ede9fe;
  border-color: var(--c-accent);
}
.note-item-title {
  font-size: .8375rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  margin-bottom: .2rem;
}
.note-item-preview {
  font-size: .74rem;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: .25rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.note-item-date {
  font-size: .68rem;
  color: var(--c-faint);
}

mark { background: #fef08a; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 1px; }

/* Note highlight states during organize */
.note-item.organizing {
  border-left: 3px solid var(--c-accent);
  background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.06);
  animation: pulse-border 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.note-item.organized {
  border-left: 3px solid var(--c-success);
  background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.07);
}
@keyframes pulse-border {
  0%, 100% { border-left-color: var(--c-accent); }
  50%       { border-left-color: #a5b4fc; }
}

.empty-state {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
  color: var(--c-faint);
}
.empty-state-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: .5rem; }
.empty-state p { font-size: .8125rem; line-height: 1.6; }

/* ── Horizontal divider (notes list / editor) ──────────────── */
.h-divider {
  height: 5px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  background: var(--c-border);
  cursor: row-resize;
  transition: background .15s;
  position: relative;
}
.h-divider:hover,
.h-divider.dragging { background: var(--c-accent); }
.h-divider::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: -4px 0;
}
.h-divider.hidden { display: none; }

/* ── Editor ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.editor-section {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border-top: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 46%;
  min-height: 160px;
  background: var(--c-surface);
}
.editor-section.hidden { display: none; }

.editor-titlebar {
  padding: .65rem .9rem .35rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.editor-title {
  width: 100%;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  font-size: .9375rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-family: var(--font);
  color: var(--c-text);
  background: transparent;
}
.editor-title::placeholder { color: var(--c-faint); font-weight: 400; }

.editor-body {
  flex: 1;
  resize: none;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  padding: .6rem .9rem;
  font-size: .8375rem;
  font-family: var(--font);
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: var(--c-text);
  background: transparent;
  overflow-y: auto;
}
.editor-body::placeholder { color: var(--c-faint); }

.editor-footer {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  padding: .55rem .9rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  background: var(--c-surface);
}
.save-status {
  margin-left: auto;
  font-size: .72rem;
  color: var(--c-faint);
  transition: color .2s;
}
.save-status.ok   { color: var(--c-success); }
.save-status.busy { color: var(--c-accent); }
.save-status.err  { color: var(--c-danger); }

/* ── Organized content ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.organized-content {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 1.75rem 2.25rem 2rem;
}

/* Splash / placeholder */
.splash {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 100%;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--c-faint);
}
.splash-icon { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.splash-title { font-size: .9375rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: .4rem; color: var(--c-muted); }
.splash-sub   { font-size: .8125rem; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 340px; }

/* Organize status */
.organize-status {
  font-size: .72rem;
  color: var(--c-muted);
}
.organize-status.busy { color: var(--c-accent); }
.organize-status.ok   { color: var(--c-success); }

/* Streaming cursor */
.streaming-cursor::after {
  content: '▋';
  color: var(--c-accent);
  animation: blink .9s step-end infinite;
}
@keyframes blink { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0; } }

/* ── Markdown styles ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.md h1 {
  font-size: 1.7rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  padding-bottom: .55rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--c-accent);
  color: var(--c-text);
  line-height: 1.25;
}
.md h2 {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-top: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: .65rem;
  color: var(--c-accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
}
.md h2::before {
  content: '';
  display: inline-block;
  width: 4px;
  height: 1.1em;
  background: var(--c-accent);
  border-radius: 2px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.md h3 {
  font-size: .975rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  margin-bottom: .45rem;
  color: var(--c-text);
}
.md h4 {
  font-size: .9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: .35rem;
  color: var(--c-muted);
}
.md p {
  font-size: .875rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  margin-bottom: .75rem;
  color: var(--c-text);
}
.md ul, .md ol {
  padding-left: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: .75rem;
}
.md li {
  font-size: .875rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: .2rem;
}
.md li::marker { color: var(--c-accent); }
.md code {
  font-family: var(--mono);
  font-size: .8rem;
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #7c3aed;
  padding: .1rem .35rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.md pre {
  background: #1e293b;
  color: #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.md pre code { background: transparent; color: inherit; padding: 0; }
.md blockquote {
  border-left: 3px solid var(--c-accent);
  padding: .25rem 0 .25rem 1rem;
  margin: .75rem 0;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  font-style: italic;
}
.md hr {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}
.md strong { font-weight: 700; }
.md em     { font-style: italic; }
.md a      { color: var(--c-accent); }
.md a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

/* ── Scrollbars ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
::-webkit-scrollbar         { width: 5px; height: 5px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track   { background: transparent; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb   { background: var(--c-border-2); border-radius: 3px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--c-muted); }

/* ── Responsive ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .body { flex-direction: column; }
  .panel-left { width: 100%; height: 50%; border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border); }
  .divider { display: none; }
}

/* ── Right panel fullscreen ────────────────────────────────── */
.body.right-fullscreen .panel-left,
.body.right-fullscreen .divider { display: none; }
.body.right-fullscreen .panel-right { width: 100% !important; }
/* hide footer controls and other right-panel sections in fullscreen */
.body.right-fullscreen .toc-editor-footer { display: none; }
.body.right-fullscreen #chapterView,
.body.right-fullscreen #rightSplash { display: none; }

/* ── TOC Editor ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.toc-editor {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.toc-editor-header {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem .75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  background: var(--c-surface);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .6rem;
}

.toc-book-title {
  width: 100%;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-family: var(--font);
  color: var(--c-text);
  background: transparent;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--c-border);
  padding-bottom: .3rem;
}
.toc-book-title:focus { border-bottom-color: var(--c-accent); }
.toc-book-title::placeholder { color: var(--c-faint); font-weight: 400; }

.toc-settings {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.toc-setting-label {
  font-size: .75rem;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .4rem;
}
.toc-max-input {
  width: 52px;
  padding: .2rem .4rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border-2);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  font-size: .775rem;
  font-family: var(--font);
  color: var(--c-text);
  background: var(--c-bg);
  outline: none;
}
.toc-max-input:focus { border-color: var(--c-accent); }

.toc-chapter-list {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: .5rem .75rem;
}

.toc-chapter {
  background: var(--c-surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  margin-bottom: .45rem;
  cursor: default;
  transition: box-shadow .12s;
}
.toc-chapter.drag-over { box-shadow: 0 -3px 0 var(--c-accent); }
.toc-chapter.dragging  { opacity: .45; }

.toc-chapter-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  padding: .55rem .65rem;
}

.toc-drag-handle {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  color: var(--c-faint);
  cursor: grab;
  font-size: .85rem;
  user-select: none;
  padding: 0 .1rem;
}
.toc-drag-handle:active { cursor: grabbing; }

.toc-chapter-title-input {
  flex: 1;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  font-size: .84rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: var(--font);
  color: var(--c-text);
  background: transparent;
  min-width: 0;
}
.toc-chapter-title-input:focus {
  background: var(--c-bg);
  border-radius: 3px;
  padding: 1px 4px;
}

.toc-note-badge {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  background: var(--c-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: .1rem .45rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.toc-note-badge.stale { color: #b45309; background: #fffbeb; border-color: #fde68a; }

.toc-expand-btn,
.toc-remove-btn {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: .75rem;
  color: var(--c-faint);
  padding: 2px 5px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  line-height: 1;
  transition: color .1s, background .1s;
}
.toc-expand-btn:hover { color: var(--c-accent); background: #ede9fe; }
.toc-remove-btn:hover { color: var(--c-danger);  background: #fee2e2; }

.toc-chapter-body {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  padding: .6rem .85rem .75rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .6rem;
  max-height: 520px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}
.toc-chapter-body.hidden { display: none; }

.toc-chapter-desc {
  width: 100%;
  resize: none;
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  padding: .35rem .5rem;
  font-size: .775rem;
  font-family: var(--font);
  color: var(--c-text);
  background: var(--c-bg);
  outline: none;
  line-height: 1.55;
  min-height: 52px;
}
.toc-chapter-desc:focus { border-color: var(--c-accent); }

.toc-note-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .5rem;
}

.toc-note-card {
  background: var(--c-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.toc-note-card-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .5rem;
  padding: .35rem .55rem;
  background: var(--c-surface);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border);
}

.toc-note-card-title {
  font-size: .775rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--c-text);
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.toc-note-move {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border-2);
  background: var(--c-bg);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  font-size: .7rem;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: .15rem .3rem;
  font-family: var(--font);
}
.toc-note-move:focus { outline: 1px solid var(--c-accent); }

.toc-note-card-body {
  padding: .45rem .55rem;
  font-size: .775rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--c-text);
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-word;
  max-height: 180px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.toc-note-card.toc-note-empty {
  border-color: var(--c-danger);
  background: #fff5f5;
}

.toc-note-card.toc-note-ghost {
  border-color: var(--c-border-2);
  background: #f8f8f8;
  opacity: .7;
}

.toc-note-empty-label {
  padding: .3rem .55rem;
  font-size: .72rem;
  color: var(--c-danger);
  font-style: italic;
}

.toc-note-delete-btn {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  padding: .15rem .4rem;
  font-size: .72rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--c-danger);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--c-danger);
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-right: .25rem;
}
.toc-note-delete-btn:hover { background: var(--c-danger); color: #fff; }

.toc-editor-footer {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: .65rem 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  background: var(--c-surface);
}
.toc-footer-right { display: flex; gap: .5rem; }

/* ── Chapter View ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.chapter-view {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.chapter-tabs {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0;
  overflow-x: auto;
  background: var(--c-surface);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  padding: 0 .75rem;
  scrollbar-width: none;
}
.chapter-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

.chapter-tab {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  padding: .55rem .85rem;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
  background: none;
  font-family: var(--font);
  font-size: .775rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: color .12s, border-color .12s;
  position: relative;
}
.chapter-tab:hover { color: var(--c-text); }
.chapter-tab.active {
  color: var(--c-accent);
  border-bottom-color: var(--c-accent);
  font-weight: 700;
}
.chapter-tab.stale { color: #b45309; }
.chapter-tab.stale::after {
  content: '~';
  margin-left: .2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.chapter-tab.writing {
  color: var(--c-accent);
  animation: tab-pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes tab-pulse {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  50%       { opacity: .45; }
}

.chapter-content-wrap {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.chapter-stale-bar {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: .45rem 1.25rem;
  background: #fffbeb;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #fde68a;
  font-size: .775rem;
  color: #92400e;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.chapter-stale-bar.hidden { display: none; }

.chapter-body {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 1.75rem 2.25rem 2rem;
}

.chapter-unwritten {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 100%;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--c-faint);
  gap: .75rem;
}
.chapter-unwritten-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; }
.chapter-unwritten p { font-size: .8125rem; color: var(--c-muted); }

/* ── Split note modal ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.split-modal-overlay {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.45);
  z-index: 100;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 1.5rem;
}
.split-modal-overlay.hidden { display: none; }

.split-modal {
  background: var(--c-surface);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 680px;
  max-height: 80vh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.split-modal-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: .85rem 1.1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.split-modal-title {
  font-size: .9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--c-text);
}

.split-modal-subtitle {
  font-size: .775rem;
  color: var(--c-muted);
  padding: .5rem 1.1rem 0;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.split-modal-sections {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: .75rem 1.1rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.split-section {
  display: flex;
  gap: .65rem;
  background: var(--c-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.split-section-num {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 28px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: var(--c-accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.split-section-body {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.split-section-title {
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  padding: .4rem .55rem;
  font-size: .8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: var(--font);
  color: var(--c-text);
  background: var(--c-surface);
  width: 100%;
}
.split-section-title:focus { border-bottom-color: var(--c-accent); }

.split-section-content {
  padding: .4rem .55rem;
  font-size: .775rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--c-text);
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-word;
  max-height: 140px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.split-modal-footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: .75rem 1.1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.split-modal-hint {
  font-size: .72rem;
  color: var(--c-faint);
}

/* ── Print: chapter view ────────────────────────────────────── */
/* ── Print / Save as PDF ───────────────────────────────────── */
@media print {
  @page { margin: 2cm 2.5cm; }

  html, body { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; }

  /* Hide everything except the organized content */
  .header,
  .panel-left,
  .divider,
  .panel-header { display: none !important; }

  .app, .body, .panel-right {
    display: block !important;
    height: auto !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
    width: 100% !important;
  }

  .organized-content,
  .chapter-body {
    overflow: visible !important;
    height: auto !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }
  .chapter-tabs,
  .chapter-stale-bar,
  .toc-editor { display: none !important; }
  .chapter-content-wrap,
  .chapter-view { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; }

  /* Hide streaming cursor in print */
  .streaming-cursor::after { display: none !important; }

  /* Tighten up markdown for print */
  .md h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; border-bottom-color: #000; }
  .md h2 { color: #000; font-size: 1.1rem; }
  .md h2::before { background: #000; }
  .md h3 { font-size: .95rem; }
  .md a  { color: #000; text-decoration: underline; }
  .md code { background: #f5f5f5; }
  .md pre  { background: #f5f5f5; color: #000; border: 1px solid #ddd; }

  /* Avoid page breaks inside headings or short blocks */
  .md h1, .md h2, .md h3 { page-break-after: avoid; }
  .md p, .md li { orphans: 3; widows: 3; }
}
lib/bookStore.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'fs';
import path         from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname  = path.dirname(__filename);
const DATA_DIR   = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'data');

export function getBookDir(userId) {
  return path.join(DATA_DIR, `book_${userId}`);
}

export function ensureBookDir(userId) {
  const dir = getBookDir(userId);
  if (!existsSync(dir)) mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
  return dir;
}

export function loadToc(userId) {
  const p = path.join(getBookDir(userId), 'toc.json');
  if (!existsSync(p)) return null;
  try { return JSON.parse(readFileSync(p, 'utf-8')); } catch { return null; }
}

export function saveToc(userId, toc) {
  ensureBookDir(userId);
  writeFileSync(path.join(getBookDir(userId), 'toc.json'), JSON.stringify(toc, null, 2));
}

export function loadChapter(userId, chapterId) {
  const p = path.join(getBookDir(userId), chapterId, 'chapter.md');
  if (!existsSync(p)) return '';
  try { return readFileSync(p, 'utf-8'); } catch { return ''; }
}

export function saveChapter(userId, chapterId, text) {
  const dir = path.join(getBookDir(userId), chapterId);
  if (!existsSync(dir)) mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
  writeFileSync(path.join(dir, 'chapter.md'), text);
}

export function assembleManuscript(userId, toc) {
  const parts = [];
  if (toc.title) parts.push(`# ${toc.title}`);
  for (const ch of toc.chapters) {
    const text = loadChapter(userId, ch.id);
    if (text) parts.push(text);
  }
  const manuscript = parts.join('\n\n');
  ensureBookDir(userId);
  writeFileSync(path.join(getBookDir(userId), 'manuscript.md'), manuscript);
  return manuscript;
}

export function loadManuscript(userId) {
  const p = path.join(getBookDir(userId), 'manuscript.md');
  if (!existsSync(p)) return '';
  try { return readFileSync(p, 'utf-8'); } catch { return ''; }
}
lib/crypto.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import {
  scryptSync,
  pbkdf2Sync,
  randomBytes,
  createCipheriv,
  createDecipheriv,
  timingSafeEqual,
} from 'crypto';

const SCRYPT_N   = 1 << 14;  // 16 384 — ~100 ms
const KEY_LEN    = 32;
const SALT_LEN   = 16;
const IV_LEN     = 12;
const TAG_LEN    = 16;
const PBKDF2_IT  = 100_000;

// ── Password hashing (scrypt) ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function hashPassword(password) {
  const salt = randomBytes(SALT_LEN).toString('hex');
  const hash = scryptSync(password, salt, KEY_LEN, { N: SCRYPT_N }).toString('hex');
  return `${salt}:${hash}`;
}

export function verifyPassword(password, stored) {
  const [salt, storedHash] = stored.split(':');
  const hash     = scryptSync(password, salt, KEY_LEN, { N: SCRYPT_N });
  const expected = Buffer.from(storedHash, 'hex');
  if (hash.length !== expected.length) return false;
  return timingSafeEqual(hash, expected);
}

// ── Encryption key derivation (pbkdf2) ───────────────────────────────────
// encSalt is stored in users.json; encKey is derived from password+encSalt
// and is NEVER stored — only lives in the signed JWT.

export function generateEncSalt() {
  return randomBytes(32).toString('hex');
}

export function deriveEncKey(password, encSalt) {
  return pbkdf2Sync(password, encSalt, PBKDF2_IT, KEY_LEN, 'sha256').toString('hex');
}

// ── AES-256-GCM helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

function aesEncrypt(plaintext, keyHex) {
  const key    = Buffer.from(keyHex, 'hex');
  const iv     = randomBytes(IV_LEN);
  const cipher = createCipheriv('aes-256-gcm', key, iv);
  const enc    = Buffer.concat([cipher.update(plaintext, 'utf8'), cipher.final()]);
  const tag    = cipher.getAuthTag();          // MUST read after cipher.final()
  return Buffer.concat([iv, tag, enc]).toString('base64');
}

function aesDecrypt(encoded, keyHex) {
  try {
    const key     = Buffer.from(keyHex, 'hex');
    const buf     = Buffer.from(encoded, 'base64');
    const iv      = buf.subarray(0, IV_LEN);
    const tag     = buf.subarray(IV_LEN, IV_LEN + TAG_LEN);
    const enc     = buf.subarray(IV_LEN + TAG_LEN);
    const deciph  = createDecipheriv('aes-256-gcm', key, iv);
    deciph.setAuthTag(tag);
    return deciph.update(enc) + deciph.final('utf8');
  } catch {
    return null;  // null = decryption failed (not the same as empty string)
  }
}

// ── Note encryption / decryption ─────────────────────────────────────────

export function encryptNote(note, keyHex) {
  return {
    ...note,
    title:   aesEncrypt(note.title,   keyHex),
    content: aesEncrypt(note.content, keyHex),
  };
}

export function decryptNote(note, keyHex) {
  const title   = aesDecrypt(note.title,   keyHex);
  const content = aesDecrypt(note.content, keyHex);
  return {
    ...note,
    // If decryption returns null (failed), fall back to raw stored value (plain-text notes)
    title:   (title   ?? note.title   ?? '') || 'Untitled Note',
    content:  content ?? note.content ?? '',
  };
}
lib/noteStore.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { DATA_DIR } from './userStore.js';

const notesPath = (userId) => path.join(DATA_DIR, `notes_${userId}.json`);
const cachePath = (userId) => path.join(DATA_DIR, `cache_${userId}.json`);

export function loadNotes(userId) {
  try { return JSON.parse(readFileSync(notesPath(userId), 'utf-8')); }
  catch { return []; }
}

export function saveNotes(userId, notes) {
  writeFileSync(notesPath(userId), JSON.stringify(notes, null, 2), 'utf-8');
}

export function loadCache(userId) {
  try { return JSON.parse(readFileSync(cachePath(userId), 'utf-8')); }
  catch { return { text: '', noteHashes: {} }; }
}

export function saveCache(userId, cache) {
  try { writeFileSync(cachePath(userId), JSON.stringify(cache), 'utf-8'); }
  catch { /* ignore */ }
}
lib/userStore.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import { readFileSync, writeFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync } from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname  = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
export const DATA_DIR   = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'data');
const        USERS_FILE = path.join(DATA_DIR, 'users.json');

export function ensureDataDir() {
  if (!existsSync(DATA_DIR))  mkdirSync(DATA_DIR, { recursive: true });
  if (!existsSync(USERS_FILE)) writeFileSync(USERS_FILE, '[]', 'utf-8');
}

function loadUsers() {
  try { return JSON.parse(readFileSync(USERS_FILE, 'utf-8')); }
  catch { return []; }
}

function saveUsers(users) {
  writeFileSync(USERS_FILE, JSON.stringify(users, null, 2), 'utf-8');
}

export function findByUsername(username) {
  return loadUsers().find((u) => u.username.toLowerCase() === username.toLowerCase());
}

export function findById(id) {
  return loadUsers().find((u) => u.id === id);
}

// Returns the created user object, or null if username already taken.
export function createUser({ id, username, passwordHash, encSalt }) {
  const users = loadUsers();
  if (users.find((u) => u.username.toLowerCase() === username.toLowerCase())) return null;
  const user = { id, username, passwordHash, encSalt, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() };
  users.push(user);
  saveUsers(users);
  return user;
}
routes/authRoutes.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import { Router }      from 'express';
import { randomUUID }  from 'crypto';
import jwt             from 'jsonwebtoken';
import { hashPassword, verifyPassword, generateEncSalt, deriveEncKey } from '../lib/crypto.js';
import { findByUsername, createUser } from '../lib/userStore.js';

const router = Router();

const COOKIE_OPTS = {
  httpOnly: true,
  sameSite: 'lax',
  secure:   process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
  maxAge:   7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,  // 7 days
};

function makeToken(user, encKey) {
  return jwt.sign(
    { userId: user.id, username: user.username, encKey },
    process.env.JWT_SECRET,
    { expiresIn: '7d' },
  );
}

// POST /api/auth/register
router.post('/register', (req, res) => {
  const { username, password } = req.body ?? {};
  if (!username?.trim() || !password)
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Username and password are required' });
  const uname = username.trim();
  if (uname.length < 2 || uname.length > 32)
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Username must be 2–32 characters' });
  if (password.length < 8)
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Password must be at least 8 characters' });
  if (findByUsername(uname))
    return res.status(409).json({ error: 'Username already taken' });

  const encSalt     = generateEncSalt();
  const encKey      = deriveEncKey(password, encSalt);
  const user        = createUser({
    id:           randomUUID(),
    username:     uname,
    passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
    encSalt,
  });

  res.cookie('token', makeToken(user, encKey), COOKIE_OPTS);
  res.status(201).json({ username: user.username });
});

// POST /api/auth/login
router.post('/login', (req, res) => {
  const { username, password } = req.body ?? {};
  if (!username || !password)
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Username and password are required' });

  const user = findByUsername(username.trim());
  if (!user || !verifyPassword(password, user.passwordHash))
    return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid username or password' });

  const encKey = deriveEncKey(password, user.encSalt);
  res.cookie('token', makeToken(user, encKey), COOKIE_OPTS);
  res.json({ username: user.username });
});

// POST /api/auth/logout
router.post('/logout', (_req, res) => {
  res.clearCookie('token');
  res.json({ success: true });
});

// GET /api/auth/me  — lightweight session check
router.get('/me', (req, res) => {
  const token = req.cookies?.token;
  if (!token) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Not authenticated' });
  try {
    const { username } = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    res.json({ username });
  } catch {
    res.clearCookie('token');
    res.status(401).json({ error: 'Session expired' });
  }
});

export default router;
routes/bookRoutes.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import express         from 'express';
import Anthropic        from '@anthropic-ai/sdk';
import { randomUUID, randomBytes, createHash } from 'crypto';
import { requireAuth }  from '../middleware/auth.js';
import { loadNotes, saveNotes }    from '../lib/noteStore.js';
import { decryptNote, encryptNote }  from '../lib/crypto.js';
import {
  loadToc, saveToc, loadChapter, saveChapter,
  assembleManuscript, loadManuscript,
} from '../lib/bookStore.js';

const router = express.Router();
const client = new Anthropic({ maxRetries: 5 });

// ── Prompts ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const TOC_SYSTEM = `You are a professional book editor. Analyze a collection of raw notes and design a table of contents for a book.

Rules:
- Create a compelling, evocative book title that captures the overall theme
- Chapter titles must be specific and evocative, not generic labels like "Chapter 1"
- Each chapter gets a 1–2 sentence description of what it covers
- Assign EVERY note (by its exact ID string) to exactly one chapter — no note left unassigned, no note duplicated
- No chapter may exceed maxNotesPerChapter (provided in the user message)
- Balance chapters reasonably — avoid extreme note-count imbalances unless the material demands it
- Output ONLY valid JSON with no markdown fences, no commentary, no extra text before or after:
{
  "title": "Book Title",
  "chapters": [
    {
      "title": "Chapter Title",
      "description": "What this chapter covers in 1–2 sentences.",
      "noteIds": ["exact-note-id-1", "exact-note-id-2"]
    }
  ]
}`;

const CHAPTER_SYSTEM = `You are a professional author writing a single chapter of a book.

Rules:
- Write ONLY this chapter's content — do not write other chapters, no preamble
- Begin with ## followed by the chapter title
- Write in rich, flowing, publication-ready prose — engaging and authoritative
- Incorporate ALL content from every provided note — skip nothing, omit no detail
- Expand ideas: add narrative context, explain the "why", draw connections, elaborate on implications
- Use ### sub-headings for major sub-topics within the chapter (2–3 max)
- Use bullet lists only for genuinely list-like content (steps, distinct items); all narrative must be prose paragraphs
- Output ONLY the chapter markdown — no meta-commentary, no preamble, no editor's notes`;

const REBALANCE_SYSTEM = `You are a book editor making MINIMAL adjustments to a table of contents to accommodate new or changed notes — like AVL tree rotations, only rebalance what is strictly necessary.

Rules:
- Slot new notes into existing chapters first; only create a new chapter if a note truly does not belong anywhere
- Only suggest splitting a chapter if it would exceed maxNotesPerChapter after assignments
- Only suggest removing a chapter if it would become empty after note deletions
- Never rename or restructure existing chapters unless absolutely required
- Output ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "assignments": [{"noteId": "uuid", "chapterId": "existing-ch-id"}],
  "newChapters":  [{"title": "...", "description": "...", "noteIds": ["uuid"]}],
  "removeChapterIds": [],
  "splitChapter": null
}
If no changes are needed output: {"assignments":[],"newChapters":[],"removeChapterIds":[],"splitChapter":null}`;

const SPLIT_SYSTEM = `You are analyzing notes to identify which ones contain multiple genuinely distinct topics that would work better as separate, independent notes.

Rules:
- Only split a note if it contains 2 or more truly distinct topics, themes, or ideas that stand alone
- Do NOT split just because a note is long — only split when topics are genuinely independent of each other
- Each resulting section must be self-contained and meaningful without the others
- Give each section a specific, descriptive title that captures its unique topic
- Preserve ALL content exactly as written — do not summarize, rewrite, or omit a single word
- If a note is already focused on one topic, mark split: false and omit the sections array
- Output ONLY valid JSON, no markdown fences, no commentary:
{
  "results": [
    {
      "originalId": "uuid",
      "split": true,
      "sections": [
        { "title": "Specific Title", "content": "Complete content preserved verbatim…" },
        { "title": "Another Title",  "content": "Complete content preserved verbatim…" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "originalId": "uuid2",
      "split": false
    }
  ]
}`;

// ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function noteHash(note) {
  return createHash('md5').update(note.title + '\n' + note.content).digest('hex');
}

function newChapterId() {
  return 'ch-' + randomBytes(4).toString('hex');
}

// Full content — used when writing chapters (needs all detail)
function formatNotes(notes) {
  return notes
    .map((n, i) => `**[Note ${i + 1}] ID: ${n.id} | Title: ${n.title}**\n\n${n.content}`)
    .join('\n\n---\n\n');
}

// Truncated — used for TOC generation and rebalance (topic overview only)
function formatNotesSummary(notes, maxChars = 600) {
  return notes
    .map((n, i) => {
      const preview = n.content.length > maxChars
        ? n.content.slice(0, maxChars) + '…'
        : n.content;
      return `**[Note ${i + 1}] ID: ${n.id} | Title: ${n.title}**\n\n${preview}`;
    })
    .join('\n\n---\n\n');
}

function getDecryptedNotes(userId, encKey) {
  return loadNotes(userId).map((n) => decryptNote(n, encKey));
}

// Robustly extract the first JSON object from a Claude response,
// handling markdown code fences and extra surrounding text.
function extractJson(text) {
  // Strip markdown fences if present
  const fenced = text.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
  const candidate = fenced ? fenced[1] : text;

  // Find outermost { ... }
  const start = candidate.indexOf('{');
  if (start === -1) return null;

  let depth = 0;
  for (let i = start; i < candidate.length; i++) {
    if (candidate[i] === '{') depth++;
    else if (candidate[i] === '}') {
      depth--;
      if (depth === 0) {
        try { return JSON.parse(candidate.slice(start, i + 1)); } catch { return null; }
      }
    }
  }
  return null;
}

function computeStaleness(toc, notes) {
  const hashes = {};
  for (const n of notes) hashes[n.id] = noteHash(n);
  return toc.chapters.map((ch) => {
    if (!ch.written) return { ...ch, stale: false };
    const stale = ch.noteIds.some(
      (id) => !hashes[id] || hashes[id] !== (ch.noteHashes ?? {})[id]
    );
    return { ...ch, stale };
  });
}

// ── GET /api/book/toc ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

router.get('/toc', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const { userId, encKey } = req.user;
  const toc = loadToc(userId);
  if (!toc) return res.json(null);

  const notes    = getDecryptedNotes(userId, encKey);
  toc.chapters   = computeStaleness(toc, notes);
  res.json(toc);
});

// ── POST /api/book/toc/generate (SSE) ────────────────────────────────────────

router.post('/toc/generate', requireAuth, async (req, res) => {
  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
  res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
  res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
  res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
  res.flushHeaders();

  const send = (p) => res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify(p)}\n\n`);
  const { userId, encKey } = req.user;
  const notes = getDecryptedNotes(userId, encKey);

  if (notes.length === 0) {
    send({ error: 'No notes to organize. Add some notes first.' });
    return res.end();
  }

  const maxNotes = Number(req.body?.maxNotesPerChapter) || 8;
  send({ progress: `Analyzing ${notes.length} note${notes.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}…` });

  try {
    // Stream the response so the SSE connection stays alive during long generations
    let raw = '';
    let charCount = 0;

    const minChapters = Math.ceil(notes.length / maxNotes);
    const maxChapters = Math.max(minChapters, Math.ceil(notes.length / 3));

    const stream = client.messages.stream({
      model:      'claude-sonnet-4-6',
      max_tokens: 32000,
      system:     TOC_SYSTEM,
      messages: [{
        role:    'user',
        content: `Create a table of contents for a book from these ${notes.length} notes.\n\nConstraints:\n- maxNotesPerChapter: ${maxNotes}\n- Aim for ${minChapters}–${maxChapters} chapters (use as many as needed so no chapter exceeds ${maxNotes} notes)\n- Use every note ID exactly as listed — do not invent or omit any ID\n\n${formatNotesSummary(notes)}`,
      }],
    });

    for await (const event of stream) {
      if (event.type === 'content_block_delta' && event.delta.type === 'text_delta') {
        raw       += event.delta.text;
        charCount += event.delta.text.length;
        // Send a keepalive progress ping every ~500 chars so the connection stays alive
        if (charCount % 500 < event.delta.text.length) {
          send({ progress: `Building table of contents… (${Math.round(charCount / 1000)}k chars)` });
        }
      }
    }

    const parsed = extractJson(raw);
    if (!parsed) {
      console.error('TOC raw response:', raw.slice(0, 1000));
      throw new Error('Claude did not return valid JSON. Check server logs.');
    }
    const toc = {
      title:              parsed.title ?? 'My Book',
      maxNotesPerChapter: maxNotes,
      approved:           false,
      chapters:           (parsed.chapters ?? []).map((ch) => ({
        id:          newChapterId(),
        title:       ch.title ?? 'Untitled Chapter',
        description: ch.description ?? '',
        noteIds:     ch.noteIds ?? [],
        noteHashes:  {},
        written:     false,
        stale:       false,
      })),
    };

    saveToc(userId, toc);
    send({ toc, done: true });
    res.end();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('TOC generate error:', err.message);
    send({ error: err.message ?? 'Failed to generate TOC' });
    res.end();
  }
});

// ── PUT /api/book/toc ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

router.put('/toc', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const { userId } = req.user;
  const toc = req.body;
  if (!toc || !Array.isArray(toc.chapters)) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid TOC' });
  }
  saveToc(userId, toc);
  res.json(toc);
});

// ── POST /api/book/toc/rebalance ──────────────────────────────────────────────

router.post('/toc/rebalance', requireAuth, async (req, res) => {
  const { userId, encKey } = req.user;
  const toc = loadToc(userId);
  if (!toc) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'No TOC found. Generate one first.' });

  const notes   = getDecryptedNotes(userId, encKey);
  const noteMap = Object.fromEntries(notes.map((n) => [n.id, n]));

  const assignedIds = new Set(toc.chapters.flatMap((ch) => ch.noteIds));
  const unassigned  = notes.filter((n) => !assignedIds.has(n.id));
  const deletedIds  = [...assignedIds].filter((id) => !noteMap[id]);

  if (unassigned.length === 0 && deletedIds.length === 0) {
    return res.json({
      diff: { assignments: [], newChapters: [], removeChapterIds: [], splitChapter: null },
      message: 'No changes needed',
    });
  }

  try {
    const tocSummary = toc.chapters
      .map((ch) => `  - "${ch.title}" (id: ${ch.id}, notes: ${ch.noteIds.filter((id) => noteMap[id]).length}, max: ${toc.maxNotesPerChapter})`)
      .join('\n');

    const parts = [`Current chapters:\n${tocSummary}`];
    if (unassigned.length > 0) parts.push(`New/unassigned notes:\n${formatNotesSummary(unassigned)}`);
    if (deletedIds.length  > 0) parts.push(`Deleted note IDs (remove from their chapters): ${deletedIds.join(', ')}`);

    const msg = await client.messages.create({
      model:      'claude-sonnet-4-6',
      max_tokens: 2048,
      system:     REBALANCE_SYSTEM,
      messages: [{ role: 'user', content: parts.join('\n\n') }],
    });

    const raw  = msg.content.find((b) => b.type === 'text')?.text ?? '';
    const diff = extractJson(raw)
      ?? { assignments: [], newChapters: [], removeChapterIds: [], splitChapter: null };

    diff.deletedNoteIds = deletedIds;
    res.json({ diff });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Rebalance error:', err.message);
    res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
  }
});

// ── POST /api/book/toc/rebalance/apply ───────────────────────────────────────

router.post('/toc/rebalance/apply', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const { userId } = req.user;
  const { diff }   = req.body;
  const toc        = loadToc(userId);
  if (!toc) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'No TOC' });

  // Remove deleted notes from all chapters
  const deletedSet = new Set(diff.deletedNoteIds ?? []);
  for (const ch of toc.chapters) {
    const before = ch.noteIds.length;
    ch.noteIds = ch.noteIds.filter((id) => !deletedSet.has(id));
    if (ch.noteIds.length < before && ch.written) ch.stale = true;
  }

  // Reassign notes
  for (const { noteId, chapterId } of diff.assignments ?? []) {
    for (const ch of toc.chapters) ch.noteIds = ch.noteIds.filter((id) => id !== noteId);
    const target = toc.chapters.find((ch) => ch.id === chapterId);
    if (target) { target.noteIds.push(noteId); if (target.written) target.stale = true; }
  }

  // Remove empty + explicitly listed chapters
  const removeSet = new Set(diff.removeChapterIds ?? []);
  toc.chapters = toc.chapters.filter((ch) => !removeSet.has(ch.id) && ch.noteIds.length > 0);

  // Add new chapters
  for (const nc of diff.newChapters ?? []) {
    toc.chapters.push({
      id: newChapterId(), title: nc.title, description: nc.description ?? '',
      noteIds: nc.noteIds ?? [], noteHashes: {}, written: false, stale: false,
    });
  }

  // Handle split
  if (diff.splitChapter) {
    const { chapterId, into } = diff.splitChapter;
    const idx = toc.chapters.findIndex((ch) => ch.id === chapterId);
    if (idx !== -1) {
      toc.chapters.splice(idx, 1, ...into.map((nc) => ({
        id: newChapterId(), title: nc.title, description: nc.description ?? '',
        noteIds: nc.noteIds ?? [], noteHashes: {}, written: false, stale: false,
      })));
    }
  }

  saveToc(userId, toc);
  res.json(toc);
});

// ── POST /api/book/chapters/:chapterId/write (SSE) ───────────────────────────

router.post('/chapters/:chapterId/write', requireAuth, async (req, res) => {
  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
  res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
  res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
  res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
  res.flushHeaders();

  const send = (p) => res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify(p)}\n\n`);
  const { userId, encKey } = req.user;
  const { chapterId }      = req.params;

  const toc = loadToc(userId);
  if (!toc)    { send({ error: 'No TOC found' });      return res.end(); }
  const chapter = toc.chapters.find((ch) => ch.id === chapterId);
  if (!chapter) { send({ error: 'Chapter not found' }); return res.end(); }

  const allNotes     = getDecryptedNotes(userId, encKey);
  const chapterNotes = allNotes.filter((n) => chapter.noteIds.includes(n.id));

  if (chapterNotes.length === 0) {
    send({ error: 'No notes assigned to this chapter' });
    return res.end();
  }

  send({ start: true, chapterId });

  let chapterText = '';
  let saved       = false;

  req.on('close', () => {
    if (!saved && chapterText.length > 50) saveChapter(userId, chapterId, chapterText);
  });

  let lastErr;
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 5; attempt++) {
    try {
      chapterText = '';
      const stream = client.messages.stream({
        model:      'claude-sonnet-4-6',
        max_tokens: 16000,
        system:     CHAPTER_SYSTEM,
        messages: [{
          role:    'user',
          content: `Write the chapter titled "${chapter.title}".\n\nChapter description: ${chapter.description}\n\nNotes to incorporate:\n\n${formatNotes(chapterNotes)}`,
        }],
      });

      for await (const event of stream) {
        if (event.type === 'content_block_delta' && event.delta.type === 'text_delta') {
          chapterText += event.delta.text;
          send({ text: event.delta.text });
        }
      }
      lastErr = null;
      break; // success
    } catch (err) {
      lastErr = err;
      const isRateLimit  = err.status === 429;
      const isOverloaded = err.status === 529 || err.message?.includes('overloaded');
      if (!isRateLimit && !isOverloaded) break; // don't retry hard errors
      const wait = isRateLimit ? 65_000 : (attempt + 1) * 10_000;
      send({ countdown: Math.ceil(wait / 1000) });
      await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, wait));
      send({ progress: 'Retrying…' });
    }
  }

  if (lastErr) {
    send({ error: lastErr.message ?? 'Failed to write chapter' });
    return res.end();
  }

  // Persist
  saveChapter(userId, chapterId, chapterText);

  const hashes = {};
  for (const n of chapterNotes) hashes[n.id] = noteHash(n);
  chapter.noteHashes = hashes;
  chapter.written    = true;
  chapter.stale      = false;
  saveToc(userId, toc);
  assembleManuscript(userId, toc);

  saved = true;
  send({ done: true, chapterId });
  res.end();
});

// ── GET /api/book/chapters/:chapterId ─────────────────────────────────────────

router.get('/chapters/:chapterId', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const { userId }    = req.user;
  const { chapterId } = req.params;
  const text = chapterId === 'all'
    ? loadManuscript(userId)
    : loadChapter(userId, chapterId);
  res.json({ text });
});

// ── GET /api/book/manuscript ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

router.get('/manuscript', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const { userId } = req.user;
  const toc = loadToc(userId);
  if (!toc) return res.json({ text: '' });
  res.json({ text: assembleManuscript(userId, toc) });
});

// ── POST /api/book/notes/smart-split (SSE) ── declared FIRST so Express matches
//    the literal "smart-split" segment before trying /:noteId routes below ──────

router.post('/notes/smart-split', requireAuth, async (req, res) => {
  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
  res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
  res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
  res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
  res.flushHeaders();

  const send = (p) => res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify(p)}\n\n`);
  const { userId, encKey } = req.user;

  const allNotes = getDecryptedNotes(userId, encKey);

  // Only analyze notes with enough content to be worth splitting
  const MIN_WORDS  = 100;
  const candidates = allNotes.filter((n) => {
    const words = (n.title + ' ' + n.content).trim().split(/\s+/).length;
    return words >= MIN_WORDS;
  });

  if (candidates.length === 0) {
    send({ progress: 'No notes long enough to split.', done: true, stats: { analyzed: 0, split: 0, created: 0 } });
    return res.end();
  }

  send({ progress: `Found ${candidates.length} note${candidates.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} to analyze…` });

  const BATCH_SIZE = 5;
  let totalSplit   = 0;
  let totalCreated = 0;
  const notesToRemove = new Set();
  const notesToAdd    = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < candidates.length; i += BATCH_SIZE) {
    const batch = candidates.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
    const end   = Math.min(i + BATCH_SIZE, candidates.length);
    send({ progress: `Analyzing notes ${i + 1}–${end} of ${candidates.length}…` });

    const batchText = batch
      .map((n, j) => `**[Note ${j + 1}] ID: ${n.id} | Title: ${n.title}**\n\n${n.content}`)
      .join('\n\n---\n\n');

    try {
      let raw = '';
      const stream = client.messages.stream({
        model:      'claude-sonnet-4-6',
        max_tokens: 16000,
        system:     SPLIT_SYSTEM,
        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `Analyze these ${batch.length} note${batch.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} and identify any that should be split into separate notes.\n\n${batchText}` }],
      });

      for await (const event of stream) {
        if (event.type === 'content_block_delta' && event.delta.type === 'text_delta') {
          raw += event.delta.text;
          if (raw.length % 800 < event.delta.text.length) {
            send({ progress: `Analyzing notes ${i + 1}–${end} of ${candidates.length}…` });
          }
        }
      }

      const parsed = extractJson(raw);
      if (!parsed?.results) continue;

      for (const result of parsed.results) {
        if (!result.split || !Array.isArray(result.sections) || result.sections.length < 2) continue;

        const original = batch.find((n) => n.id === result.originalId);
        if (!original) continue;

        // Collect valid sections FIRST — only schedule removal if we have replacements
        const newSections = result.sections
          .map((s) => ({
            id:        randomUUID(),
            title:     (s.title ?? '').trim() || original.title,
            content:   (s.content ?? '').trim(),
            createdAt: original.createdAt,
            updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          }))
          .filter((n) => n.content); // skip any section Claude left blank

        if (newSections.length < 2) continue; // not a real split — skip

        notesToRemove.add(original.id);
        notesToAdd.push(...newSections);
        totalSplit++;
        totalCreated += newSections.length;
        send({ progress: `Split "${original.title}" into ${newSections.length} notes` });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      const isRateLimit  = err.status === 429;
      const isOverloaded = err.status === 529 || err.message?.includes('overloaded');
      if (isRateLimit || isOverloaded) {
        send({ progress: 'Rate limit hit — waiting 65s before continuing…' });
        await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 65_000));
        i -= BATCH_SIZE;
        continue;
      }
      console.error('Smart split batch error:', err.message);
    }
  }

  if (notesToRemove.size > 0 || notesToAdd.length > 0) {
    const enc     = loadNotes(userId);
    const current = enc.filter((n) => !notesToRemove.has(n.id));
    const newEnc  = notesToAdd.map((n) => encryptNote(n, encKey));
    saveNotes(userId, [...newEnc, ...current]);
  }

  send({ done: true, stats: { analyzed: candidates.length, split: totalSplit, created: totalCreated } });
  res.end();
});

// ── POST /api/book/notes/:noteId/split-preview ───────────────────────────────

router.post('/notes/:noteId/split-preview', requireAuth, async (req, res) => {
  const { userId, encKey } = req.user;
  const { noteId }         = req.params;

  const allNotes = getDecryptedNotes(userId, encKey);
  const note     = allNotes.find((n) => n.id === noteId);
  if (!note) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Note not found' });

  try {
    let raw = '';
    const stream = client.messages.stream({
      model:      'claude-sonnet-4-6',
      max_tokens: 16000,
      system:     SPLIT_SYSTEM,
      messages: [{
        role:    'user',
        content: `Analyze this note and split it if it covers multiple distinct topics.\n\n**ID: ${note.id} | Title: ${note.title}**\n\n${note.content}`,
      }],
    });
    for await (const event of stream) {
      if (event.type === 'content_block_delta' && event.delta.type === 'text_delta') {
        raw += event.delta.text;
      }
    }

    const parsed = extractJson(raw);
    if (!parsed?.results?.[0]) {
      return res.json({ split: false, sections: [] });
    }

    const result = parsed.results[0];
    if (!result.split || !Array.isArray(result.sections) || result.sections.length < 2) {
      return res.json({ split: false, sections: [] });
    }

    res.json({ split: true, sections: result.sections });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Split preview error:', err.message);
    res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
  }
});

// ── POST /api/book/notes/:noteId/split-apply ──────────────────────────────────

router.post('/notes/:noteId/split-apply', requireAuth, (req, res) => {
  const { userId, encKey }  = req.user;
  const { noteId }          = req.params;
  const { sections }        = req.body;

  if (!Array.isArray(sections) || sections.length < 2) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Need at least 2 sections' });
  }

  const enc  = loadNotes(userId);
  const orig = enc.find((n) => n.id === noteId);
  if (!orig) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Note not found' });

  const origDecrypted = decryptNote(orig, encKey);
  const newNotes = sections.map((s) => ({
    id:        randomUUID(),
    title:     (s.title ?? '').trim() || origDecrypted.title,
    content:   (s.content ?? '').trim(),
    createdAt: origDecrypted.createdAt,
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  }));

  const remaining = enc.filter((n) => n.id !== noteId);
  const encrypted = newNotes.map((n) => encryptNote(n, encKey));
  saveNotes(userId, [...encrypted, ...remaining]);

  res.json({ created: newNotes });
});

export default router;
middleware/auth.js JavaScript ▶ expand 
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

export function requireAuth(req, res, next) {
  const token = req.cookies?.token;
  if (!token) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Not authenticated' });
  try {
    req.user = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    next();
  } catch {
    res.clearCookie('token');
    return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Session expired' });
  }
}
